024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
025import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
026import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.PredicateUtils.*;
027import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
028import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.emptyIfNull;
029import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.isEmpty;
030import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
031import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
032import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.eq;
033import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOpAnnotation.*;
034import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestServerConstants.*;

036import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util.RestUtils.*;

038import java.io.*;

040import java.lang.reflect.*;
041import java.lang.reflect.Method;
042import java.time.*;

050import org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3.OpenApi;
051import org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.*;
052import org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.adapter.*;
053import org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger.Swagger;
054import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
055import org.apache.juneau.commons.function.*;
056import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.MediaType;
057import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
058import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
059import org.apache.juneau.commons.logging.Logger;
060import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
061import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ParameterInfo;
062import org.apache.juneau.commons.settings.*;
063import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;

067import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
068import org.apache.juneau.http.Response;
069import org.apache.juneau.http.header.*;
070import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
071import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
072import org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp.*;
073import org.apache.juneau.marshall.encoders.*;

075import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
076import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
077import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.*;
078import org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi.*;

085import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug.format.*;
086import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart.*;
087import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.*;
088import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.*;
089import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi.*;
090import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.*;
091import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rrpc.*;
092import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
093import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile.*;
094import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats.*;
095import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger.*;
096import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.*;

100
101import jakarta.servlet.*;
102import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
103
104/**
105 * Defines the initial configuration of a <c>RestServlet</c> or <c>@Rest</c> annotated object.
106 *
107 * <p>
108 * An extension of the {@link ServletConfig} object used during servlet initialization.
109 *
110 * <p>
111 * Configuration is supplied declaratively through the {@link Rest @Rest} annotation on the resource class
112 * (and inherited from any parent classes), and programmatically through {@link Bean @Bean}-annotated
113 * methods/fields that contribute named beans (e.g. <c>encoders</c>, <c>parsers</c>, <c>callLogger</c>) to the REST
114 * resource's bean store. Where direct construction is needed (test rigs, mock clients, embedded usage),
115 * the public constructor takes a {@link RestContext.Args} record carrying the bootstrap state.
116 *
117 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
118 * <p class='bjava'>
119 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(path=<js>"/myresource"</js>, serializers=JsonSerializer.<jk>class</jk>, parsers=JsonParser.<jk>class</jk>)
120 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyResource {
121 *
122 *       <jc>// Programmatically contribute a bean to the resource's bean store.</jc>
123 *       <ja>@Bean</ja>
124 *       <jk>public</jk> CallLogger callLogger() {
125 *          <jk>return new</jk> MyCustomCallLogger();
126 *       }
127 *    }
128 * </p>
129 *
130 * <p>
131 * The historical <c>public MyResource(RestContext.Builder builder)</c> constructor-injection pattern and the
132 * <c>{@link RestInit @RestInit} public void init(RestContext.Builder builder)</c> method-injection pattern were both
133 * removed in 10.0. {@code RestContext.Builder} itself is on the deletion path; new code should not depend on it.
134 * See <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/V10.0MigrationGuide">v10.0 Migration Guide</a>
135 * for replacement recipes.
136 *
137 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
138 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
139 * </ul>
140 *
141 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
142 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestContext">RestContext</a>
143 * </ul>
144 */
145@SuppressWarnings({
146   "java:S112",  // RuntimeException used in memoizer lambdas to re-wrap checked exceptions (ServletException/Exception) that Supplier<T> cannot declare
147   "java:S115",  // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_allowContentParam)
148   "java:S1200", // Class has many dependencies; acceptable for this core context class
149   "java:S1192", // Duplicate string literals are property key names and REST annotation attribute values; intentional
150   "java:S125",  // Explanatory comments reference SVL ($C{...}/$E{...}) and annotation (@Bean/@Rest) tokens that Sonar misreads as commented-out code
151   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity in field-initializer lambdas (memoizer wiring); cannot annotate at lambda scope
152   "java:S6539", // Monster class; RestContext is intentionally a central hub for REST framework configuration
153   "resource"    // Streams and session objects returned to callers; lifecycle managed by the servlet container or RestCall
154})
155public class RestContext extends Context {
156
157   private static final Logger LOG = Logger.getLogger(RestContext.class);
158
159   // Property name constants
160   private static final String PROP_allowContentParam = "allowContentParam";
161   private static final String PROP_beanStore = "beanStore";
162   private static final String PROP_consumes = "consumes";
163   private static final String PROP_defaultRequestAttributes = "defaultRequestAttributes";
164   private static final String PROP_defaultRequestHeaders = "defaultRequestHeaders";
165   private static final String PROP_defaultResponseHeaders = "defaultResponseHeaders";
166   private static final String PROP_partParser = "partParser";
167   private static final String PROP_partSerializer = "partSerializer";
168   private static final String PROP_produces = "produces";
169   private static final String PROP_responseProcessors = "responseProcessors";
170   private static final String PROP_restOpArgs = "restOpArgs";
171   private static final String PROP_bootstrapVarResolver = "bootstrapVarResolver";
172   private static final String PROP_staticFiles = "staticFiles";
173   private static final String PROP_swaggerProvider = "swaggerProvider";
174   private static final String PROP_openApiProvider = "openApiProvider";
175
176   /**
177    * Bootstrap arguments for {@link RestContext}.
178    *
179    * <p>
180    * Bundles the small, fixed set of inputs needed to construct a {@link RestContext} into a single immutable record.
181    *
182    * <p>
183    * All non-required values default sensibly:
184    * <ul>
185    *    <li>{@code parentContext}, {@code servletConfig} — {@code null} (top-level resource, no servlet container)
186    *    <li>{@code path} — {@code ""} (no path prefix)
187    *    <li>{@code beanStoreConfigurer} — no-op (no pre-build bean-store mutation)
188    *    <li>{@code overridingParent} — {@code null} (no test-time override layer)
189    * </ul>
190    *
191    * <p>
192    * The {@code beanStoreConfigurer} hook gives test fixtures and integration code a chance to register beans on
193    * the {@link WritableBeanStore} after the resource has been wired in but before the
194    * {@code findXxx()} memoizers fire.
195    *
196    * <p>
197    * The {@code overridingParent} hook installs a {@link BeanStore} into the {@code overridingParent} slot of the
198    * freshly-constructed {@link BasicBeanStore} so that test-time overrides resolve at tier 1 of the lookup chain
199    * (above the resource's local {@code @Bean} factory entries and the Spring bridge).  This is the
200    * canonical Mode INJECT wiring point for {@code juneau-junit5}'s {@code TestBeanStore}.
201    *
202    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
203    * <p class='bjava'>
204    *    <jk>var</jk> <jv>ctx</jv> = <jk>new</jk> RestContext(<jk>new</jk> RestContext.Args(MyResource.<jk>class</jk>, () -&gt; <jk>new</jk> MyResource()));
205    * </p>
206    *
207    * @param resourceClass The {@link Rest @Rest}-annotated REST resource class. Must not be {@code null}.
208    * @param parentContext The parent {@link RestContext}, or {@code null} if this is a top-level resource.
209    * @param servletConfig The {@link ServletConfig} from the servlet container, or {@code null} when none is available.
210    * @param resource The supplier that provides the resource instance during initialization. Must not be {@code null}.
211    * @param path The path prefix relative to the parent. Defaults to {@code ""}.
212    * @param beanStoreConfigurer A pre-build hook that runs against the resolved {@link WritableBeanStore}
213    *    after the resource has been wired in but before any {@code findXxx()} memoizer fires. Defaults to a no-op.
214    * @param overridingParent An optional test-time override layer installed into the {@code overridingParent}
215    *    slot of the freshly-constructed {@link BasicBeanStore}.  May be {@code null}.  Honored only when the
216    *    resource does <i>not</i> declare an {@code @Bean WritableBeanStore} factory method; user-supplied bean
217    *    stores are passed through unchanged.
218    * @param paths An optional programmatic override for the top-level mount-paths array (the highest-priority
219    *    rung in the runtime-override chain documented on {@link RestContext#getPaths()}).  {@code null} (the
220    *    default) means &quot;no programmatic override&quot; &mdash; resolution falls through to the resource's
221    *    {@code getPaths()} getter, then {@link Rest#paths()} (SVL-resolved per element and comma-split).
222    *    An empty array explicitly clears the mount list (no top-level mounts).
223    * @param kind The build-time {@link ContextKind kind} of this context — {@link ContextKind#ROOT ROOT} for a
224    *    top-level/host/mock resource, {@link ContextKind#CHILD CHILD} for a {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)}
225    *    sub-resource (isolated resolution), or a {@link ContextKind.Mixin MIXIN} carrying the {@link ResolvedMixin}
226    *    that produced a per-mixin sub-context (parent-linked to the host so that
227    *    {@link RestContext#getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String) annotation-property walks} prepend the host's
228    *    {@code @Rest} chain before the mixin's own).
229    *
230    * @since 10.0.0
231    */
232   @SuppressWarnings({
233      "java:S6218" // Args is a transient constructor-parameter holder; it is never compared for equality or used as a map key, so array-identity semantics on the paths[] component are irrelevant.
234   })
235   public static record Args(
236      Class<?> resourceClass,
237      RestContext parentContext,
238      ServletConfig servletConfig,
239      Supplier<?> resource,
240      String path,
241      Consumer<WritableBeanStore> beanStoreConfigurer,
242      BeanStore overridingParent,
243      String[] paths,
244      ContextKind kind,
245      RestBuilder<?> restBuilder
246   ) {
247
248      /**
249       * Compact canonical constructor — null-coalesces optional fields and validates required ones.
250       */
251      public Args {
252         assertArgNotNull("resourceClass", resourceClass);
253         assertArgNotNull("resource", resource);
254         if (path == null)
255            path = "";
256         if (beanStoreConfigurer == null)
257            beanStoreConfigurer = bs -> {};
258         if (kind == null)
259            kind = ContextKind.ROOT;
260      }
261
262      /**
263       * Back-compatible constructor without the {@code restBuilder} component (defaults it to <jk>null</jk>).
264       *
265       * <p>
266       * The {@code restBuilder} is then resolved during {@link RestContext} construction from the
267       * resource instance's stashed builder, so call sites that don't carry one keep working unchanged.
268       *
269       * @param resourceClass The resource class.
270       * @param parentContext The parent context, or <jk>null</jk>.
271       * @param servletConfig The servlet config, or <jk>null</jk>.
272       * @param resource The resource supplier.
273       * @param path The mount path override, or <jk>null</jk>.
274       * @param beanStoreConfigurer The bean-store configurer, or <jk>null</jk>.
275       * @param overridingParent The overriding parent bean store, or <jk>null</jk>.
276       * @param paths The programmatic mount-paths override, or <jk>null</jk>.
277       * @param kind The build-time {@link ContextKind kind} of this context, or <jk>null</jk> for {@link ContextKind#ROOT}.
278       */
279      public Args(Class<?> resourceClass, RestContext parentContext, ServletConfig servletConfig, Supplier<?> resource, String path, Consumer<WritableBeanStore> beanStoreConfigurer, BeanStore overridingParent, String[] paths, ContextKind kind) {
280         this(resourceClass, parentContext, servletConfig, resource, path, beanStoreConfigurer, overridingParent, paths, kind, null);
281      }
282
283      /**
284       * Returns {@code true} when this context is a per-mixin sub-context (its {@link #kind()} is a
285       * {@link ContextKind.Mixin}).
286       *
287       * @return {@code true} for a mixin sub-context.
288       */
289      public boolean isMixinContext() {
290         return kind instanceof ContextKind.Mixin;
291      }
292   }
293
294   /**
295    * The discovery-time normalized declaration of a single mixin.
296    *
297    * <p>
298    * Every mixin entry &mdash; whether a bare {@link Rest#mixins() Class&lt;?&gt;} or a rich
299    * {@link Rest#mixinDefs() &#64;Mixin} &mdash; is normalized to one of these immutable carriers at discovery
300    * time, so all downstream code consumes a single shape with no bare-vs-def branching.  A bare class is
301    * normalized to {@code new ResolvedMixin(type, MixinAnnotation.DEFAULT)} (i.e. {@code @Mixin(type=X)} with
302    * empty overrides), so a bare class and an empty-override {@code @Mixin} are structurally identical.
303    *
304    * <p>
305    * The {@code overrides} annotation is the single home for the host-declared override payload (guards,
306    * serializers, default headers, {@code path}/{@code paths}, {@code noInherit}, &hellip;).  For bare classes
307    * it is {@link MixinAnnotation#DEFAULT} (all slots empty), which contributes nothing &mdash; so bare-class
308    * mixins behave exactly as they did before the {@code @Mixin} feature.
309    *
310    * @param type The mixin class.
311    * @param overrides The host-declared override annotation, or {@link MixinAnnotation#DEFAULT} for a bare class.
312    *
313    * @since 10.0.0
314    */
315   public static record ResolvedMixin(Class<?> type, Mixin overrides) {
316
317      /**
318       * Compact canonical constructor — validates required components and null-coalesces {@code overrides}.
319       */
320      public ResolvedMixin {
321         assertArgNotNull("type", type);
322         if (overrides == null)
323            overrides = MixinAnnotation.DEFAULT;
324      }
325
326      /**
327       * Normalizes a bare mixin class to a {@link ResolvedMixin} with no overrides.
328       *
329       * @param type The mixin class.
330       * @return A {@link ResolvedMixin} carrying {@link MixinAnnotation#DEFAULT} overrides.
331       */
332      static ResolvedMixin ofBare(Class<?> type) {
333         return new ResolvedMixin(type, MixinAnnotation.DEFAULT);
334      }
335
336      /**
337       * Normalizes a rich {@code @Mixin} declaration to a {@link ResolvedMixin}.
338       *
339       * @param m The {@code @Mixin} annotation.
340       * @return A {@link ResolvedMixin} carrying {@code m} as its override payload.
341       */
342      static ResolvedMixin ofDef(Mixin m) {
343         return new ResolvedMixin(m.type(), m);
344      }
345
346      /**
347       * Returns {@code true} when this mixin carries no host-declared overrides (i.e. is equivalent to a bare class).
348       *
349       * @return {@code true} if the override payload is {@link MixinAnnotation#DEFAULT}.
350       */
351      boolean hasNoOverrides() {
352         return overrides == MixinAnnotation.DEFAULT;
353      }
354   }
355
356   /**
357    * The build-time <i>kind</i> of a {@link RestContext} — which of the three construction flavors produced it.
358    *
359    * <p>
360    * Replaces the former boolean {@code mixinContext} flag on {@link Args} with a typed discriminator so the
361    * three flavors are explicit and self-documenting at every call site, and so the {@code MIXIN} flavor can
362    * carry the {@link ResolvedMixin} that produced it (the single home for the host-declared override payload,
363    * consumed at build time when the mixin sub-context resolves its settings).
364    *
365    * <p>
366    * <b>Mixin vs. child asymmetry (important — do not assume symmetry):</b> a {@link Mixin} sub-context is
367    * parent-linked to the host and <i>inherits</i> the host's {@code @Rest} annotation chain
368    * ({@link #getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String)} walks host&rarr;mixin), so {@code @Mixin} overrides
369    * <i>layer on top of</i> an inherited chain.  A {@link Child} is <i>isolated</i> ({@link #HOST_ONLY_PROPERTIES}
370    * includes {@code children}; children retain pre-10.0.0 isolated resolution with no parent walk).  So a future
371    * {@code @Child} would <i>seed</i> settings onto an isolated context rather than <i>override</i> an inherited
372    * chain, and would have no {@code noInherit} analog — it must NOT reuse the mixin override-resolution path.
373    * The {@code Child} variant is intentionally shaped so it can later widen to reference a {@code ResolvedChild}
374    * (mirroring how {@code Mixin} references a {@code ResolvedMixin}) without re-plumbing this discriminator.
375    * See {@code MAYBE-182} for the parked {@code @Child} design.
376    *
377    * @since 10.0.0
378    */
379   public sealed interface ContextKind permits ContextKind.Root, ContextKind.Child, ContextKind.Mixin {
380
381      /** A top-level (host) resource, mock context, or servlet-mounted resource. */
382      record Root() implements ContextKind {}
383
384      /** A routed child resource (mounted via {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)}); isolated resolution. */
385      record Child() implements ContextKind {}
386
387      /**
388       * A per-mixin sub-context (composed via {@link Rest#mixins()}/{@link Rest#mixinDefs()}); inherits the host chain.
389       *
390       * @param def The normalized declaration that produced this sub-context — carries the host-declared override payload.
391       */
392      record Mixin(ResolvedMixin def) implements ContextKind {}
393
394      /** Shared {@link Root} singleton (the common case). */
395      ContextKind ROOT = new Root();
396
397      /** Shared {@link Child} singleton (the path override travels in {@link Args#path()}, not here). */
398      ContextKind CHILD = new Child();
399   }
400
401   /**
402    * Builder class.
403    *
404    * <p>
405    * Demoted to package-private in the April 2026 refactor (2026-04-19). User code should construct a
406    * {@link RestContext} via the public {@link #RestContext(Args)} constructor; this Builder
407    * exists only as internal bootstrap state for the framework and is slated for inlining in a later phase.
408    */
409   @SuppressWarnings({
410      "rawtypes" // Raw types required: annotation type parameter is unknown at static analysis time.
411   })
412   static class Builder extends Context.Builder implements ServletConfig {
413
414      private final Class<?> resourceClass;
415      private final RestContext parentContext;
416      private final ServletConfig inner;
417      final Args args;
418
419      /**
420       * Programmatic top-level mount-paths override.
421       *
422       * <p>
423       * Highest-priority rung in the runtime-override chain documented on {@link RestContext#getPaths()}.
424       * Set via {@link #paths(String...)}.
425       *
426       * <ul>
427       *    <li>{@code null} (default) &mdash; no programmatic override; falls through to the resource's
428       *       {@code getPaths()} getter, then the {@code @Rest(paths=...)} annotation default (SVL-resolved
429       *       per element and comma-split).
430       *    <li>Empty array &mdash; explicit clear; resource is resolved with no top-level mounts.
431       *    <li>Non-empty array &mdash; replaces all lower rungs.
432       * </ul>
433       */
434      String[] paths;
435
436      /**
437       * Programmatic override for the MDC async propagation flag.
438       *
439       * <p>
440       * {@code null} (default) &mdash; defers to the {@code RestContext.mdcAsyncPropagation} env-driven
441       * default (itself defaulting to {@code true} when SLF4J is detected). Set via
442       * {@link #mdcAsyncPropagation(boolean)}.
443       */
444      Boolean mdcAsyncPropagation;
445
446      /**
447       * Programmatic override for the async-completion executor bean name.
448       *
449       * <p>
450       * {@code null} (default) &mdash; resolved from the {@code @Rest(asyncCompletionExecutor)} annotation chain.
451       * Set via {@link #asyncCompletionExecutor(String)} to supply the bean-name programmatically (useful in
452       * test rigs that construct a {@link RestContext} directly without annotations).
453       */
454      String asyncCompletionExecutorName;
455
456      /**
457       * Programmatic override for the lazy-children flag.
458       *
459       * <p>
460       * {@code null} (default) &mdash; defers to the {@link Rest#lazyChildren() @Rest(lazyChildren)} annotation
461       * chain, then to the {@code RestContext.lazyChildren} env-driven default (itself defaulting to
462       * {@code false}). Set via {@link #lazyChildInit(boolean)}.
463       *
464       * <p>
465       * When {@code true}, all children registered via {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)} on this resource
466       * are built lazily on first invocation rather than eagerly at parent startup.
467       */
468      Boolean lazyChildInit;
469
470      /**
471       * Package-private constructor.
472       *
473       * <p>
474       * Minimized in the May 2026 refactor — the beanStore setup, {@code @Bean} processing,
475       * {@code @RestInit} hooks, and {@code beanStoreConfigurer} call were all moved into
476       * {@link RestContext#RestContext(Builder)}. The Builder now only stores the three fields
477       * that are final and needed by the {@link ServletConfig} overrides and factory methods.
478       *
479       * @param rci The bootstrap arguments. Must not be {@code null}.
480       */
481      Builder(Args rci) {
482         this.resourceClass = rci.resourceClass();
483         this.inner = rci.servletConfig();
484         this.parentContext = rci.parentContext();
485         this.args = rci;
486         this.paths = rci.paths();
487      }
488
489      /**
490       * Programmatic override for the top-level mount-paths array.
491       *
492       * <p>
493       * This is the highest-priority rung in the runtime-override chain &mdash; see
494       * {@link RestContext#getPaths()} for the full precedence order.
495       *
496       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
497       *    <li class='note'>
498       *       Passing {@code null} resets the override and lets the lower rungs ({@code getPaths()} getter,
499       *       {@code @Rest(paths)} annotation) resolve.
500       *    <li class='note'>
501       *       Passing {@code new String[0]} explicitly clears the mount list &mdash; the resource ends up with
502       *       no top-level mounts, which surfaces a clear &quot;no mounts&quot; error from the hosting runtime.
503       * </ul>
504       *
505       * @param value The new mount paths, or {@code null} to inherit. Empty array clears.
506       * @return This object.
507       * @since 10.0.0
508       */
509      public Builder paths(String...value) {
510         paths = value;
511         return this;
512      }
513
514      /**
515       * Enables or disables SLF4J MDC propagation from the request thread to
516       * {@link java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture} completion threads.
517       *
518       * <p>
519       * Default is {@code true} (enabled) when SLF4J is on the runtime classpath.
520       * When enabled, the {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.MdcAsyncListener} snapshots the
521       * request thread's MDC map before the async dispatch and restores it inside the
522       * {@link java.util.concurrent.CompletionStage#whenComplete(java.util.function.BiConsumer) whenComplete}
523       * callback so that log statements emitted during async completion see the original request context.
524       *
525       * <p>
526       * Call {@code mdcAsyncPropagation(false)} to opt a resource out of MDC propagation. The global default
527       * can also be overridden via the {@code RestContext.mdcAsyncPropagation} env-driven default.
528       *
529       * @param value {@code false} to disable MDC propagation on this resource.
530       * @return This object.
531       * @since 10.0.0
532       */
533      public Builder mdcAsyncPropagation(boolean value) {
534         mdcAsyncPropagation = value;
535         return this;
536      }
537
538      /**
539       * Programmatically sets the {@link java.util.concurrent.Executor} bean name used to route
540       * {@link java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture} completion callbacks through a dedicated thread pool
541       * Equivalent to {@link Rest#asyncCompletionExecutor()} on the resource class.
542       *
543       * <p>
544       * The value is looked up by name in the resource's bean store at context-build time. If the name does
545       * not resolve to an {@link java.util.concurrent.Executor} bean, the context constructor throws. Pass
546       * {@code null} (or omit this call) to clear the override and fall back to the annotation chain.
547       *
548       * @param beanName The bean-store name of the {@link java.util.concurrent.Executor} to use, or {@code null} to clear.
549       * @return This object.
550       * @since 10.0.0
551       */
552      public Builder asyncCompletionExecutor(String beanName) {
553         asyncCompletionExecutorName = beanName;
554         return this;
555      }
556
557      /**
558       * Programmatically opt this resource into (or out of) deferred child construction.
559       *
560       * <p>
561       * When {@code true}, all children registered via {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)} are built
562       * lazily on first invocation instead of eagerly at parent startup.  The routing entry for each child
563       * is always populated at startup so URL matching works immediately.
564       *
565       * <p>
566       * This is the highest-priority knob — it overrides both the
567       * {@link Rest#lazyChildren() @Rest(lazyChildren)} annotation and the
568       * {@code RestContext.lazyChildren} env-driven default.
569       *
570       * @param value {@code true} to defer child construction to first invocation.
571       * @return This object.
572       * @since 10.0.0
573       */
574      public Builder lazyChildInit(boolean value) {
575         lazyChildInit = value;
576         return this;
577      }
578
579      @Override /* Context.Builder<?> is abstract - copy() is not meaningful for the transient RestContext bootstrap state. */
580      public Builder copy() {
581         throw new NoSuchMethodError("Not implemented.");
582      }
583
584      @Override /* Overridden from ServletConfig */
585      public String getInitParameter(String name) {
586         return inner == null ? null : inner.getInitParameter(name);
587      }
588
589      @Override /* Overridden from ServletConfig */
590      public Enumeration<String> getInitParameterNames() { return opt(inner).map(ServletConfig::getInitParameterNames).orElseGet(() -> new Vector<String>().elements()); }
591
592      @Override /* Overridden from ServletConfig */
593      public ServletContext getServletContext() {
594         if (nn(inner)) {
595            return inner.getServletContext();
596         } else if (nn(parentContext)) {
597            return parentContext.getBuilder().getServletContext();
598         } else {
599            return null;
600         }
601      }
602
603      @Override /* Overridden from ServletConfig */
604      public String getServletName() { return opt(inner).map(ServletConfig::getServletName).orElse(null); }
605
606   }
607
608   private static final Map<Class<?>,RestContext> REGISTRY = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
609
610   /**
611    * Returns a registry of all created {@link RestContext} objects.
612    *
613    * @return An unmodifiable map of resource classes to {@link RestContext} objects.
614    */
615   public static final Map<Class<?>,RestContext> getGlobalRegistry() { return u(REGISTRY); }
616
617   static ServletException servletException(String msg, Object...args) {
618      return new ServletException(f(msg, args));
619   }
620
621   static ServletException servletException(Throwable t, String msg, Object...args) {
622      return new ServletException(f(msg, args), t);
623   }
624
625   private static <T extends Annotation> Stream<Method> getAnnotatedMethods(Supplier<?> resource, Class<T> annotation) {
626      return ClassInfo.ofProxy(resource.get()).getAllMethodsTopDown().stream()
627         .filter(y -> y.hasAnnotation(annotation))
628         .filter(distinctByKey(MethodInfo::getSignature))
629         .map(y -> y.accessible().inner());
630   }
631
632   /**
633    * Resolves the top-level mount paths for a resource using the runtime-override chain.
634    *
635    * <p>
636    * Walks the three rungs in precedence order (highest first):
637    * <ol>
638    *    <li>Programmatic override on {@link Builder#paths} (set by {@link Builder#paths(String...)} or seeded from
639    *       {@link Args#paths()}).
640    *    <li>The resource's {@code getPaths()} getter (when non-{@code null}).
641    *    <li>{@link Rest#paths() @Rest(paths)} annotation default, walked top-down with the most-derived non-empty
642    *       array winning.  Each element is SVL-resolved against a session of {@code vr} backed by
643    *       {@code beanStore} (so {@code $C{key}} consults whatever {@link Config} is registered), then
644    *       comma-split.
645    * </ol>
646    *
647    * @return The resolved paths array (never {@code null}; possibly empty).
648    */
649   private static String[] resolveMountPaths(Builder builder, Object resource, VarResolver vr, WritableBeanStore beanStore, List<AnnotationInfo<Rest>> annotations) {
650      // Rung 1: programmatic override (Builder.paths / Args.paths).
651      var programmatic = builder.paths;
652      if (programmatic != null)
653         return programmatic.clone();
654      return resolvePathsCore(annotations, resource, vr, beanStore);
655   }
656
657   /**
658    * Public mount-time path resolver for use by hosting runtimes that mount {@code @Rest}-annotated resources
659    * before the {@link RestContext} has been constructed (e.g. {@code JettyServerComponent}'s auto-discovery
660    * loop, or Spring Boot's {@code ServletRegistrationBean} wiring).
661    *
662    * <p>
663    * Operates on the same chain as {@link RestContext#getPaths()} but skips the programmatic Builder rung
664    * (which is only meaningful inside the {@link RestContext} constructor):
665    * <ol>
666    *    <li>The resource's {@code getPaths()} virtual getter (defined on {@code RestServlet} /
667    *       {@code RestResource}). {@code null} return falls through; non-{@code null} (including empty array) wins.
668    *    <li>{@link Rest#paths() @Rest(paths)} annotation default on the most-derived class, SVL-resolved per
669    *       element and comma-split.  A {@code VarResolver} is looked up on {@code store} (when present); SVL
670    *       variables like {@code $C{key}} resolve against beans visible to the bean store.
671    * </ol>
672    *
673    * @param resourceClass The {@code @Rest}-annotated resource class. Must not be {@code null}.
674    * @param resource The resource instance. May be {@code null} (in which case the getter rung is skipped).
675    * @param store The bean store used to look up the {@link VarResolver} for SVL substitution on annotation
676    *    elements, and to back the resolver session for bean-driven SVL vars like {@code $C{key}}. May be
677    *    {@code null} (SVL is then skipped; literals pass through unchanged).
678    * @return The resolved paths array (never {@code null}; possibly empty).
679    * @since 10.0.0
680    */
681   public static String[] resolveTopLevelPaths(Class<?> resourceClass, Object resource, BeanStore store) {
682      var ap = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE;
683      var ci = ClassInfo.of(resourceClass);
684      var annotations = rstream(ap.find(Rest.class, ci)).toList();
685      var vr = (store == null) ? null : store.getBean(VarResolver.class).orElse(null);
686      // Cast for the bean-store-backed resolver session only — when store is a plain BeanStore (not
687      // WritableBeanStore) we skip the session form and call vr.resolve(...) directly.
688      var ws = (store instanceof WritableBeanStore wbs) ? wbs : null;
689      return resolvePathsCore(annotations, resource, vr, ws);
690   }
691
692   private static String[] resolvePathsCore(List<AnnotationInfo<Rest>> annotations, Object resource, VarResolver vr, WritableBeanStore beanStore) {
693      // Rung 2: getPaths() virtual getter on the resource (RestServlet / RestResource / any matching class).
694      // The getter return is normalized to a flat List<String> of raw leaves (any String / String[] /
695      // Collection / Iterable / Stream / nested mix of those), then each leaf flows through the same
696      // SVL-resolve + comma-split pipeline used for @Rest(paths=...) annotation elements.
697      var raw = invokeGetPaths(resource);
698      if (raw != null) {
699         var leaves = normalizePaths(raw);
700         return expandPathsElements(leaves.toArray(new String[0]), vr, beanStore);
701      }
702
703      // Rung 3: @Rest(paths) annotation default — most-derived non-empty array wins, with each element
704      // SVL-resolved then comma-split (trim each piece, drop empties).  A single template element can
705      // therefore expand to zero, one, or many mount paths.  Annotation arrays from javac are never
706      // null, so the only filter needed is the empty-array case.
707      return annotations.stream()
708         .map(ai -> ai.inner().paths())
709         .filter(arr -> arr.length > 0)
710         .findFirst()
711         .map(arr -> expandPathsElements(arr, vr, beanStore))
712         .orElseGet(() -> new String[0]);
713   }
714
715   /**
716    * Applies the per-element SVL + comma-split pipeline to a {@code @Rest(paths=...)} array.
717    *
718    * <p>
719    * Each input element is SVL-resolved (via a session of the bootstrap {@link VarResolver} that's backed
720    * by {@code beanStore} when one is available, so bean-driven vars like {@code $C{key}} can find the
721    * registered {@link Config}), then split on {@code ,}; each piece is trimmed and empty pieces are
722    * dropped.  This lets a single element like {@code "$C{health.paths}"} or
723    * {@code "$E{HEALTH_PATHS,/healthz,/readyz}"} expand to multiple mount paths.
724    */
725   private static String[] expandPathsElements(String[] elements, VarResolver vr, WritableBeanStore beanStore) {
726      // Open a single session for the whole array — reusing it across elements avoids re-walking the
727      // Var catalog and lets ConfigVar / FileVar / etc. all share one bean-lookup context.
728      var session = (vr == null) ? null : vr.createSession(beanStore);
729      var out = new ArrayList<String>(elements.length);
730      for (var e : elements) {
731         var resolved = applySvl(e, session);
732         splitPathsValue(resolved, out);
733      }
734      return out.toArray(new String[0]);
735   }
736
737   private static String applySvl(String value, VarResolverSession session) {
738      // Callers only pass annotation-array elements, which javac guarantees non-null.  An empty string
739      // has no SVL markers to resolve, so we short-circuit it (avoids a pointless session.resolve call).
740      if (session == null || value.isEmpty())
741         return value;
742      try {
743         return session.resolve(value);
744      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") Exception e) {
745         return value; // SVL failure: prefer the literal over throwing during construction.
746      }
747   }
748
749   private static void splitPathsValue(String value, List<String> out) {
750      // Callers pass the return of applySvl, which never returns null (we control both branches above).
751      if (value.isBlank())
752         return;
753      var parts = value.split(",");
754      for (var p : parts) {
755         var t = p.trim();
756         if (! t.isEmpty())
757            out.add(t);
758      }
759   }
760
761   /**
762    * Flattens any {@link Object} returned from {@code getPaths()} (String, {@code String[]},
763    * {@link Collection}, {@link Iterable}, {@link Stream}, primitive array, or nested mixes of these)
764    * into a flat {@link List} of raw leaf strings.
765    *
766    * <p>
767    * Non-{@link String} leaves are coerced via {@link String#valueOf(Object)}.  The returned list
768    * preserves traversal order; {@code null} leaves are dropped.  Comma-split + SVL resolution are
769    * intentionally <i>not</i> applied here &mdash; they happen downstream in
770    * {@link #expandPathsElements(String[], VarResolver, WritableBeanStore)} so SVL substitution sees the
771    * raw element (preserving {@code $E{NAME,defaultWithCommas}}-style defaults) before the post-SVL
772    * comma-split fires.
773    */
774   private static List<String> normalizePaths(Object o) {
775      if (o == null)
776         return List.of();
777      var out = new ArrayList<String>();
778      CollectionUtils.<Object>accumulate(o).forEach(x -> {
779         if (x != null)
780            out.add(String.valueOf(x));
781      });
782      return out;
783   }
784
785   /**
786    * Reflectively invokes a no-arg {@code getPaths()} method on the resource (defined on
787    * {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestServlet RestServlet} and
788    * {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestResource RestResource}). Reflection is used to avoid coupling this
789    * static utility to either base class &mdash; if a custom {@code @Rest}-annotated POJO declares
790    * {@code public Object getPaths()} (or any covariant return type such as {@code String[]},
791    * {@code List<String>}, etc.), it participates uniformly.
792    *
793    * @return The raw getter return value, or {@code null} when no method exists, the method returns
794    *    {@code void}, the method returned {@code null}, or reflective invocation failed.
795    */
796   private static Object invokeGetPaths(Object resource) {
797      if (resource == null)
798         return null;
799      Method m;
800      try {
801         m = resource.getClass().getMethod("getPaths");
802      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NoSuchMethodException e) {
803         return null;
804      }
805      if (m.getReturnType() == void.class)
806         return null;
807      try {
808         return m.invoke(resource);
809      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") IllegalAccessException | java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException e) {
810         return null;
811      }
812   }
813
814   private static boolean isBeanMethod(MethodInfo mi) {
815      return isBeanMethod(mi, null);
816   }
817
818   private static boolean isBeanMethod(MethodInfo mi, String name) {
819      return mi.getAnnotations(Bean.class)
820         .map(AnnotationInfo::inner)
821         .anyMatch(x -> nn(x) && x.methodScope().length == 0 && (n(name) || eq(x.name(), name)));
822   }
823
824   protected final AtomicBoolean initialized = new AtomicBoolean(false);
825   protected final BasicHttpException initException;
826   protected final WritableBeanStore beanStore;
827   protected final WritableBeanStore bootstrapBeanStore;  // Writable during bootstrap; exposed for child-context composition.
828   protected final Builder builder;
829   protected final Class<?> resourceClass;
830   protected final ConcurrentHashMap<Locale,Swagger> swaggerCache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
831   protected final ConcurrentHashMap<Locale,OpenApi> openApiCache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
832   protected final Instant startTime;
833   protected final RestContext parentContext;
834   protected final boolean isMixinContext;
835   /** The build-time kind of this context (never {@code null}). */
836   protected final ContextKind contextKind;
837   /** The normalized mixin declaration that produced this sub-context, or {@code null} when not a mixin context. */
838   protected final ResolvedMixin resolvedMixin;
839   protected final String fullPath;
840   protected final String path;
841   protected final String[] paths;
842   protected final ThreadLocal<RestSession> localSession = new ThreadLocal<>();
843   protected final UrlPathMatcher pathMatcher;
844   private final Supplier<?> resource;
845   private AnnotationWorkList annotationWork;
846
847   /**
848    * The programmatic configuration builder for this resource, or <jk>null</jk> when configured purely
849    * by annotation.  Resolved during construction from {@link Args#restBuilder()} or, failing that, from the
850    * resource instance's stashed builder.  When non-<jk>null</jk>, a synthetic highest-priority {@code @Rest}
851    * annotation built from its set members is prepended to {@link #getRestAnnotations()} so builder-supplied
852    * values take precedence over the resource class's own {@code @Rest} annotation values.
853    */
854   private final RestBuilder<?> restBuilder;
855
856   /**
857    * The synthetic {@code @Rest} annotation built from {@link #restBuilder}'s set members, or <jk>null</jk> when
858    * there is no programmatic builder.  Prepended at the most-derived (child) position of
859    * {@link #getRestAnnotations()} so builder-supplied values win over the resource class's own annotation.
860    */
861   private final Rest builderRestAnnotation;
862
863   // Private accessors used by memoizer lambdas to satisfy Java's definite-assignment rules for blank final fields.
864   private WritableBeanStore beanStore() { return beanStore; }
865   private Supplier<?> resource() { return resource; }
866   private Class<?> resourceClass() { return resourceClass; }
867   private boolean isMixinContextField() { return isMixinContext; }
868
869   /**
870    * Field accessor for {@link #resolvedMixin}, callable from memoizer field-initializer lambdas (which run
871    * before the blank-final field is read directly).  Returns the normalized mixin declaration that produced
872    * this sub-context, or {@code null} when this is not a mixin context.
873    *
874    * @return The resolved mixin, or {@code null}.
875    */
876   private ResolvedMixin resolvedMixinField() { return resolvedMixin; }
877
878   /**
879    * Creates the bean store for this context.
880    *
881    * <p>
882    * The 10.0 precedence model places the parent (Spring or parent-resource bootstrap) as the
883    * overriding parent so it wins over local entries.  Memoizer-backed framework defaults are
884    * registered later in the constructor via {@code addDefaultSupplier}, putting them at the
885    * bottom of the resolution order.
886    *
887    * <p>
888    * Resolution:
889    * <ol>
890    *    <li>If the resource declares an {@code @Bean} factory method returning a
891    *       {@link WritableBeanStore} (e.g. {@code SpringRestServlet.createBeanStore(Optional<BeanStore>)}),
892    *       that store is used directly.  Spring integration relies on this hook.
893    *    <li>Otherwise a fresh {@link BasicBeanStore} is created with {@code parentBs} as its
894    *       regular parent and {@code overridingParent} (if non-{@code null}) installed in the
895    *       overriding-parent slot so test-time overrides win over local entries.
896    * </ol>
897    *
898    * @param parentBs
899    *    The parent (bootstrap) bean store to layer onto, or {@code null} for root resources.
900    * @param resource
901    *    The REST servlet/bean instance that this context is defined against.
902    * @param overridingParent
903    *    Optional test-time override layer for the {@code overridingParent} slot of the freshly-constructed
904    *    {@link BasicBeanStore}.  May be {@code null}.  Ignored when the resource supplies its own
905    *    {@link WritableBeanStore} via an {@code @Bean} factory method &mdash; user-supplied stores are
906    *    passed through unchanged.
907    * @return The bean store for this context.
908    */
909   private WritableBeanStore createBeanStore(BeanStore parentBs, Supplier<?> resource, BeanStore overridingParent) {
910      var defaultBs = new BasicBeanStore(parentBs, overridingParent);
911      return defaultBs.createBeanFromMethod(WritableBeanStore.class, resource.get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod)
912         .orElse(defaultBs);
913   }
914   private RestContext parentContext() { return parentContext; }
915   private RestOperations restOperations() { return restOperations.get(); }
916
917   /**
918    * Returns {@code true} when this context is a per-mixin sub-context constructed by the host's
919    * {@code restOperations} memoizer.
920    *
921    * <p>
922    * A mixin sub-context is parent-linked to the host's {@link RestContext} so that
923    * {@link #getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String) annotation-property walks} prepend the host's {@code @Rest}
924    * chain before the mixin's own &mdash; serializers, parsers, encoders, converters, response processors,
925    * REST op args, guards, callLogger, debugEnablement, messages, and varResolver tokens all inherit from the
926    * host first, with the mixin's contributions appended.  Use {@link Rest#noInherit() @Rest(noInherit)} on the
927    * mixin class to cut off inheritance for any specific property.
928    *
929    * <p>
930    * {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)} sub-resources are <i>not</i> mixin contexts &mdash; they retain
931    * pre-10.0.0 isolated resolution (no parent-context walk).  The mixin-vs-child divergence is intentional:
932    * mixins are inline composers that share the host's URL namespace; children are heavyweight independent
933    * resources mounted at their own URL prefix.
934    *
935    * @return {@code true} if this is a mixin sub-context, {@code false} for top-level resources and child
936    *    resources.
937    * @since 10.0.0
938    */
939   public boolean isMixinContext() { return isMixinContext; }
940
941   /**
942    * Returns the parent {@link RestContext}, or {@code null} for top-level resources.
943    *
944    * <p>
945    * The parent linkage drives the inheritance walk in {@link #getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String)} for
946    * {@linkplain #isMixinContext() mixin sub-contexts}, and the {@code parentContext} walks performed by
947    * {@link #getMessages()}, {@link #getVarResolver()}, {@code getFullPath()}, and the bean-store layering.
948    *
949    * @return The parent context, or {@code null} for top-level (host) resources.
950    * @since 10.0.0
951    */
952   public RestContext getParentContext() { return parentContext; }
953
954   /**
955    * Registers memoizer-backed default suppliers for every framework-managed bean type on the supplied
956    * bean store.
957    *
958    * <p>
959    * Default suppliers sit at the bottom of the bean-store resolution order: they fire only when no
960    * {@link Bean @Bean} method, no programmatic {@code addBean(...)} call, and no Spring/overriding-parent
961    * binding has been registered for the type.  This is the mechanism that replaces the old
962    * {@code DELAYED_INJECTION} list — by registering the framework's own factories as defaults
963    * <i>before</i> the {@link Bean @Bean} method walk runs, any {@link Bean @Bean} method whose parameters
964    * include framework types can now resolve those parameters lazily through the bean store without
965    * requiring a hand-maintained skip list.
966    */
967   private void registerFrameworkDefaults(WritableBeanStore bs) {
968      // @formatter:off
969      // Unnamed framework types backed by per-resource memoizers.
970      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MarshallingContext.class, marshallingContext::get);
971      bs.addDefaultSupplier(EncoderSet.class, encoders::get);
972      bs.addDefaultSupplier(SerializerSet.class, serializers::get);
973      bs.addDefaultSupplier(ParserSet.class, parsers::get);
974      bs.addDefaultSupplier(Logger.class, logger::get);
975      bs.addDefaultSupplier(java.util.logging.Logger.class, logger::get);
976      bs.addDefaultSupplier(ThrownStore.class, thrownStore::get);
977      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodExecStore.class, methodExecStore::get);
978      bs.addDefaultSupplier(Messages.class, messages::get);
979      bs.addDefaultSupplier(VarResolver.class, varResolver::get);
980      bs.addDefaultSupplier(Config.class, config::get);
981      bs.addDefaultSupplier(ResponseProcessor[].class, responseProcessors::get);
982      bs.addDefaultSupplier(CallLogger.class, callLogger::get);
983      bs.addDefaultSupplier(HttpPartSerializer.class, partSerializer::get);
984      bs.addDefaultSupplier(HttpPartParser.class, partParser::get);
985      bs.addDefaultSupplier(JsonSchemaGenerator.class, jsonSchemaGenerator::get);
986      bs.addDefaultSupplier(StaticFiles.class, staticFiles::get);
987      bs.addDefaultSupplier(FileFinder.class, staticFiles::get);
988      bs.addDefaultSupplier(DebugEnablement.class, debugEnablement::get);
989      bs.addDefaultSupplier(DebugConfig.class, debugConfig::get);
990      bs.addDefaultSupplier(SwaggerProvider.class, swaggerProvider::get);
991      bs.addDefaultSupplier(OpenApiProvider.class, openApiProvider::get);
992      bs.addDefaultSupplier(RestOperations.class, restOperations::get);
993      bs.addDefaultSupplier(RestChildren.class, restChildren::get);
994      // Named framework beans (replaces DELAYED_INJECTION_NAMES).
995      bs.addDefaultSupplier(VarResolver.class, this::getBootstrapVarResolver, PROP_bootstrapVarResolver);
996      bs.addDefaultSupplier(HttpHeaderList.class, defaultRequestHeaders::get, PROP_defaultRequestHeaders);
997      bs.addDefaultSupplier(HttpHeaderList.class, defaultResponseHeaders::get, PROP_defaultResponseHeaders);
998      bs.addDefaultSupplier(NamedAttributeMap.class, defaultRequestAttributes::get, PROP_defaultRequestAttributes);
999      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> destroyInvokerPair.get().methods, "destroyMethods");
1000      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> endCallInvokerPair.get().methods, "endCallMethods");
1001      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, postCallMethods::get, "postCallMethods");
1002      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> postInitChildFirstInvokerPair.get().methods, "postInitChildFirstMethods");
1003      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> postInitInvokerPair.get().methods, "postInitMethods");
1004      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, preCallMethods::get, "preCallMethods");
1005      bs.addDefaultSupplier(MethodList.class, () -> startCallInvokerPair.get().methods, "startCallMethods");
1006      // @formatter:on
1007   }
1008
1009   /**
1010    * Registers a {@link PropertySource} bean named {@code "rest.config"} in this resource's
1011    * {@code BeanStore} so that {@code @Value("${cfg-key}")} fields on the resource bean (and on
1012    * request-scoped beans whose {@code BeanStore} parent-walks to this one) resolve against the
1013    * resource's {@code @Rest(config=...)} {@link Config}(s).
1014    *
1015    * <p>
1016    * Lookup order honored by the registered source:
1017    * <ol>
1018    *    <li>The child class's resolved {@link Config} &mdash; sourced from {@link #rawConfig} so that
1019    *       any {@link Bean @Bean Config} factory-method override on the resource bean is preserved.
1020    *    <li>Any additional, distinct {@code @Rest(config=...)} {@code Config}s declared on parent
1021    *       classes (child-to-parent order, dedup'd by resolved file name). Child keys win on
1022    *       collision; parent keys fill the gaps.
1023    * </ol>
1024    *
1025    * <p>
1026    * Critically, this registration lives on the per-resource {@code BeanStore} &mdash; <i>not</i> on
1027    * the process-wide {@code Settings.get()} singleton. The static {@code RestContext} cache in
1028    * {@code MockRestClient} (and any other long-lived cache) is therefore benign: leaked
1029    * {@code RestContext}s carry their {@code PropertySource}s in their own {@code BeanStore}s.
1030    * The global {@code Settings} source list does not grow, and {@code Settings.get(name)}'s
1031    * reverse-order walk stays O(constant).
1032    */
1033   private void registerRestConfigPropertySources() {
1034      var sources = collectRestConfigPropertySources();
1035      if (sources.isEmpty())
1036         return;
1037      final List<PropertySource> chain = List.copyOf(sources);
1038      PropertySource src;
1039      if (chain.size() == 1) {
1040         src = chain.get(0);
1041      } else {
1042         src = name -> {
1043            for (var s : chain) {
1044               var r = s.get(name);
1045               if (r.isPresent())
1046                  return r;
1047            }
1048            return PropertyLookupResult.missing();
1049         };
1050      }
1051      beanStore.addBean(PropertySource.class, src, "rest.config");
1052   }
1053
1054   /**
1055    * Walks the {@code @Rest(config=...)} annotation chain (child-first) and builds a
1056    * {@link ConfigPropertySource} for each distinct, non-empty config attribute.
1057    *
1058    * <p>
1059    * The first (most-derived) slot reuses {@code rawConfig.get()} so that any {@link Bean @Bean}
1060    * {@code Config} factory-method override on the resource bean is preserved &mdash; the rest of
1061    * the framework already sees that exact instance via {@link #getConfig()} and {@code @RestInit}
1062    * parameter resolution. Parent slots load via {@code Config.create().name(...)} since {@code @Bean}
1063    * overrides apply to the most-derived class only.
1064    *
1065    * <p>
1066    * Edge case: a resource with no {@code @Rest(config=...)} annotation but with a {@link Bean @Bean}
1067    * {@code Config} factory method has a non-null {@code rawConfig.get()} and no annotation-driven
1068    * slot. That single {@code rawConfig} is still registered so user-supplied {@code Config}s flow
1069    * through to {@code @Value} resolution.
1070    */
1071   @SuppressWarnings({
1072      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for multi-source REST config property collection
1073      "java:S135"   // Per-annotation continue guards are clearer than restructuring the config-source filter chain.
1074   })
1075   private List<PropertySource> collectRestConfigPropertySources() {
1076      var bs = beanStore();
1077      var vr = bs.getBean(VarResolver.class, PROP_bootstrapVarResolver).orElseGet(this::getBootstrapVarResolver);
1078      var result = new ArrayList<PropertySource>();
1079      var seen = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
1080      // AnnotationProvider returns child-first; iterate in the same order so child wins on collision.
1081      var anns = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE.find(Rest.class, info(resourceClass));
1082      for (var i = 0; i < anns.size(); i++) {
1083         var raw = anns.get(i).inner().config();
1084         if (isEmpty(raw))
1085            continue;
1086         var resolvedName = vr.resolve(raw);
1087         if (isEmpty(resolvedName))
1088            continue;
1089         if (! seen.add(resolvedName))
1090            continue;
1091         Config cfg;
1092         if (result.isEmpty()) {
1093            // Most-derived child slot. rawConfig.get() captures @Bean Config override; reuse it.
1094            cfg = rawConfig.get();
1095         } else if ("SYSTEM_DEFAULT".equals(resolvedName)) {
1096            cfg = Config.getSystemDefault();
1097         } else {
1098            cfg = Config.create().varResolver(vr).name(resolvedName).build();
1099         }
1100         if (cfg != null)
1101            result.add(new ConfigPropertySource(cfg));
1102      }
1103      // Edge case: no @Rest(config=...) annotation produced a slot, but rawConfig.get() is non-null
1104      // (e.g. a @Bean Config factory method without a matching @Rest(config=...) attribute, or the
1105      // SYSTEM_DEFAULT branch fired without an annotation). Still register rawConfig as the sole source.
1106      if (result.isEmpty()) {
1107         var rc = rawConfig.get();
1108         if (rc != null)
1109            result.add(new ConfigPropertySource(rc));
1110      }
1111      return result;
1112   }
1113
1114   private static final class LifecycleInvokerPair {
1115      final MethodList methods;
1116      final MethodInvoker[] invokers;
1117
1118      LifecycleInvokerPair(MethodList methods, MethodInvoker[] invokers) {
1119         this.methods = methods;
1120         this.invokers = invokers;
1121      }
1122   }
1123
1124   /**
1125    * The {@link MarshallingContext} for this resource.
1126    *
1127    * <p>
1128    * Triggered eagerly in the constructor after {@code annotationWork} is set, so that annotation
1129    * work is applied before the builder is used by any other memoizer.
1130    */
1131   private final Memoizer<MarshallingContext.Builder> beanContextBuilder = memoizer(() -> {
1132      var v = Holder.of(MarshallingContext.create());
1133      v.get().apply(annotationWork);
1134      return v.get();
1135   });
1136
1137   /**
1138    * The {@link MarshallingContext} for this resource.
1139    */
1140   private final Memoizer<MarshallingContext> marshallingContext = memoizer(() -> beanContextBuilder.get().build());
1141
1142   /**
1143    * The unresolved (bootstrap-time) {@link Config} for this resource.
1144    *
1145    * <p>
1146    * Resolved by reading {@code @Rest(config)} from the annotation chain against the bootstrap
1147    * {@link VarResolver} (which must already be in the bean store). Triggered eagerly in the constructor
1148    * so the raw config is registered before {@code @RestInit} hooks run.
1149    */
1150   private final Memoizer<Config> rawConfig = memoizer(() -> {
1151      var bs = beanStore();
1152      var v = Holder.<Config>empty();
1153      // Bootstrap VarResolver is registered under PROP_bootstrapVarResolver during construction; the
1154      // unnamed VarResolver slot is reserved for the full runtime resolver default supplier.
1155      var vr = bs.getBean(VarResolver.class, PROP_bootstrapVarResolver).orElseGet(this::getBootstrapVarResolver);
1156      var cfv = Holder.<String>empty();
1157      rstream(AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE.find(Rest.class, info(resourceClass()))).map(x -> x.inner().config()).filter(Utils::ne).forEach(x -> cfv.set(vr.resolve(x)));
1158      var cf = cfv.orElse("");
1159      if (v.isEmpty() && "SYSTEM_DEFAULT".equals(cf))
1160         v.set(Config.getSystemDefault());
1161      if (v.isEmpty() && cf.isEmpty() && isMixinContextField() && getParentContext() != null)
1162         // Mixin sub-contexts with no own @Rest(config) inherit the host's raw Config, so that $C{...}
1163         // SVL variables embedded in inherited class-level config (e.g. the @HtmlDocConfig theme/header/
1164         // footer declared via $C{REST/...} on BasicRestConfig) resolve against the host's loaded config
1165         // rather than an empty one.  This mirrors the way messages and varResolver tokens already inherit
1166         // from the host for mixin sub-contexts.
1167         v.set(getParentContext().rawConfig.get());
1168      if (v.isEmpty()) {
1169         Config.Builder cb = Config.create().varResolver(vr);
1170         if (!cf.isEmpty())
1171            cb.name(cf);
1172         v.set(cb.build());
1173      }
1174      bs.createBeanFromMethod(Config.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1175      return v.get();
1176   });
1177
1178   /**
1179    * The bootstrap-time {@link VarResolver} — no {@link Messages} or {@link Config} bean available yet.
1180    *
1181    * <p>
1182    * Builds the same {@link Var} catalog as the runtime resolver but without {@link Messages} or {@link Config}
1183    * beans wired in — those depend on settings that are themselves resolved against this resolver.
1184    * Triggered eagerly in the constructor so the result is available in the bean store before
1185    * {@link Config} and annotation work are initialized.
1186    */
1187   // @formatter:off
1188   private final Memoizer<VarResolver> bootstrapVarResolver = memoizer(() -> {
1189      var bs = beanStore();
1190      Holder<VarResolver> v = Holder.of(
1191         VarResolver.create()
1192            .defaultVars()
1193            .defaultFunctions()
1194            .vars(VarList.of(
1195               ConfigVar.class, FileVar.class, LocalizationVar.class,
1196               RequestAttributeVar.class, RequestFormDataVar.class, RequestHeaderVar.class,
1197               RequestPathVar.class, RequestQueryVar.class, RequestVar.class,
1198               RequestSwaggerVar.class, SerializedRequestAttrVar.class, ServletInitParamVar.class,
1199               SwaggerVar.class, OpenApiVar.class, UrlVar.class, UrlEncodeVar.class, HtmlWidgetVar.class
1200            ).addDefault())
1201            .bean(FileFinder.class, FileFinder.create(bs).cp(resourceClass(), null, true).build())
1202            .build()
1203      );
1204      bs.createBeanFromMethod(VarResolver.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, PROP_bootstrapVarResolver)).ifPresent(v::set);
1205      return v.get();
1206   });
1207   // @formatter:on
1208
1209   /**
1210    * The {@link CallLogger} for this resource.
1211    *
1212    * <p>
1213    * Defaults to {@link BasicCallLogger}. {@code @Rest(callLogger=X)} most-derived non-{@code Void} class wins.
1214    * A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
1215    */
1216   private final Memoizer<CallLogger> callLogger = memoizer(() -> {
1217      var bs = beanStore();
1218      // Test-installed beans (registered via Args.beanStoreConfigurer / addSupplier) live in the
1219      // bean store's entries deque and are returned by bs.getBean(CallLogger.class) before falling
1220      // through to this memoizer's default supplier (which is what the @Rest(callLogger) chain
1221      // produces).  The memoizer therefore only needs to produce the framework default.
1222      var creator = BeanInstantiator.of(CallLogger.class, bs).type(BasicCallLogger.class).noBuilder();
1223      bs.getBeanType(CallLogger.class).ifPresent(creator::type);
1224      // @Rest(callLogger=X) — most-derived non-Void wins.
1225      // getRestAnnotationsForProperty(...) yields parent-to-child order (rstream reversal); reduce-last
1226      // keeps the most-derived value, mirroring the prior "apply each annotation, child overrides parent" semantics.
1227      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_callLogger)
1228         .map(ai -> ai.inner().callLogger())
1229         .filter(c -> c != CallLogger.Void.class)
1230         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1231         .ifPresent(creator::type);
1232      bs.createBeanFromMethod(CallLogger.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(creator::impl);
1233      return creator.asOptional().orElse(null);
1234   });
1235
1236   /**
1237    * The locally-resolved {@link RestAuthenticator} for this resource, if any.
1238    *
1239    * <p>
1240    * Resolution precedence (highest first, per design spec &sect;5.3):
1241    * <ol>
1242    *    <li>Registered bean &mdash; {@code beanStore().getBean(RestAuthenticator.class)}.
1243    *    <li>{@code @Rest(authenticator=X)} &mdash; instantiated via the bean store (constructor injection).
1244    *    <li>{@code @Bean} factory method on the resource.
1245    *    <li>{@link RestServlet#createAuthenticator(BeanStore)} override.
1246    * </ol>
1247    * The {@link RestAuthenticator.Null} sentinel is treated as &quot;unset.&quot;
1248    */
1249   private final Memoizer<Optional<RestAuthenticator>> localAuthenticator = memoizer(() -> {
1250      var bs = beanStore();
1251      var bean = bs.getBean(RestAuthenticator.class).orElse(null);
1252      if (bean != null)
1253         return opt(bean);
1254      var annoClass = getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_authenticator)
1255         .map(ai -> ai.inner().authenticator())
1256         .filter(x -> x != RestAuthenticator.Null.class)
1257         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1258         .orElse(null);
1259      if (annoClass != null)
1260         return opt(BeanInstantiator.of(RestAuthenticator.class, bs).type(annoClass).noBuilder().run());
1261      var fromMethod = bs.createBeanFromMethod(RestAuthenticator.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).orElse(null);
1262      if (fromMethod != null)
1263         return opt(fromMethod);
1264      if (resource().get() instanceof RestServlet rs) {
1265         var fromOverride = rs.createAuthenticator(bs);
1266         if (fromOverride != null)
1267            return opt(fromOverride);
1268      }
1269      return Optional.<RestAuthenticator>empty();
1270   });
1271
1272   /**
1273    * The effective root-to-this {@link RestAuthenticator} list, honoring {@code noInherit={"authenticator"}}.
1274    *
1275    * <p>
1276    * Unlike guards (which are child-isolated), authenticators inherit down the child-resource tree: the parent
1277    * context's effective list is prepended (root first), then this resource's local authenticator is appended.
1278    * A {@code @Rest(noInherit={"authenticator"})} on this resource cuts off the parent walk (subtree opt-out).
1279    */
1280   private final Memoizer<List<RestAuthenticator>> effectiveAuthenticators = memoizer(() -> {
1281      var l = new ArrayList<RestAuthenticator>();
1282      var pc = parentContext();
1283      if (isInherited(PROPERTY_authenticator) && pc != null)
1284         l.addAll(pc.getEffectiveAuthenticators());
1285      localAuthenticator.get().ifPresent(l::add);
1286      return u(l);
1287   });
1288
1289   /**
1290    * Returns the effective (root-to-this) authenticator chain for this resource.
1291    *
1292    * @return The effective authenticator chain, never <jk>null</jk>; may be empty.
1293    * @since 10.0.0
1294    */
1295   public List<RestAuthenticator> getEffectiveAuthenticators() {
1296      return effectiveAuthenticators.get();
1297   }
1298
1299   /**
1300    * Runs the effective authenticator chain for this request, folding results and applying the resolved
1301    * principal/roles to the {@link RestRequest}.
1302    *
1303    * <p>
1304    * Invoked by {@link RestSession} before {@code preCall}.  When no authenticators are configured this is a
1305    * no-op (anonymous passthrough).  Each authenticator's {@link AuthenticationException} propagates to abort
1306    * the request with a {@code 401}.
1307    *
1308    * @param session The op session for this request.
1309    * @throws AuthenticationException If credentials are present but invalid.
1310    * @since 10.0.0
1311    */
1312   protected void authenticate(RestOpSession session) throws AuthenticationException {
1313      var auths = getEffectiveAuthenticators();
1314      if (auths.isEmpty())
1315         return;
1316      var req = session.getRequest();
1317      var acc = new AuthResultAccumulator();
1318      // Seed the fold with any pre-existing identity (container security or a servlet-layer AuthFilterChain) so
1319      // roles-only ADD results from resource authenticators augment it instead of being dropped (spec §5.6/§5.7).
1320      // A later REPLACE result still overrides this seed (the accumulator resets principal+roles on REPLACE).
1321      var existing = req.getUserPrincipal();
1322      if (existing != null)
1323         acc.add(AuthResult.of(existing));
1324      for (var a : auths)
1325         a.authenticate(req).ifPresent(acc::add);  // RestRequest is-a HttpServletRequest; AuthenticationException propagates -> 401
1326      acc.result().ifPresent(req::setAuthResult);
1327   }
1328
1329   /**
1330    * The resolving {@link Config} for this resource.
1331    *
1332    * <p>
1333    * Wraps the builder's unresolved config with a {@link VarResolver} session so that SVL variables
1334    * in config values are expanded on access.
1335    */
1336   private final Memoizer<Config> config = memoizer(() -> rawConfig.get().resolving(getVarResolver().createSession()));
1337
1338   /**
1339    * The supported request content types ({@code Content-Type} media types) for this resource.
1340    *
1341    * <p>
1342    * Walks {@code @Rest(consumes)} annotations parent-to-child and returns the union. When no annotation
1343    * declares types, falls back to the intersection of all op-level parser supported media types.
1344    */
1345   private final Memoizer<List<MediaType>> consumes = memoizer(() -> {
1346      // Walk @Rest(consumes=...) chain (parent-to-child); concat all entries in chain order.
1347      var fromAnnotations = new ArrayList<MediaType>();
1348      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_consumes)
1349         .forEach(ai -> stream(ai.inner().consumes()).map(MediaType::of).forEach(fromAnnotations::add));
1350      if (! fromAnnotations.isEmpty())
1351         return u(fromAnnotations);
1352      // Fall back to the intersection of opContexts' parser-supported media types — matches legacy behavior.
1353      var opContexts = restOperations().getOpContexts();
1354      Set<MediaType> s = opContexts.isEmpty() ? emptySet() : toSet(opContexts.get(0).getParsers().getSupportedMediaTypes());
1355      opContexts.forEach(x -> s.retainAll(x.getParsers().getSupportedMediaTypes()));
1356      return u(toList(s));
1357   });
1358
1359   //---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1360   // @Value-injected env-driven defaults
1361   //
1362   // Populated by ClassInfo.of(this).inject(this, beanStore) during construction; consumed by the
1363   // memoizer lambdas below (which run lazily, i.e. after injection has completed). Each field
1364   // is the env-driven default that flows into mergeReplacedStringAttribute / mergeReplacedBooleanAttribute
1365   // as the initial value before the @Rest annotation chain is walked.
1366   //---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1367
1368   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(debugDefault)}; consumed by the {@link #debugEnablement} memoizer. */
1369   @Value("${RestContext.debugDefault:}")
1370   private String defaultDebugDefault;
1371
1372   /** Env-driven default for the call-logger debug level fallback in the {@link #debugConfig} memoizer. */
1373   @Value("${juneau.restLogger.level:INFO}")
1374   private String defaultDebugLevel;
1375
1376   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(allowedHeaderParams)}. */
1377   @Value("${RestContext.allowedHeaderParams:Accept,Content-Type}")
1378   private String defaultAllowedHeaderParams;
1379
1380   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(allowedMethodHeaders)}. */
1381   @Value("${RestContext.allowedMethodHeaders:}")
1382   private String defaultAllowedMethodHeaders;
1383
1384   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(allowedMethodParams)}. */
1385   @Value("${RestContext.allowedMethodParams:HEAD,OPTIONS}")
1386   private String defaultAllowedMethodParams;
1387
1388   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(disableContentParam)}. */
1389   @Value("${RestContext.disableContentParam:false}")
1390   private boolean defaultDisableContentParam;
1391
1392   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(renderResponseStackTraces)}. */
1393   @Value("${RestContext.renderResponseStackTraces:false}")
1394   private boolean defaultRenderResponseStackTraces;
1395
1396   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(problemDetails)}. */
1397   @Value("${RestContext.problemDetails:false}")
1398   private boolean defaultProblemDetails;
1399
1400   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(virtualThreads)}. */
1401   @Value("${RestContext.virtualThreads:false}")
1402   private boolean defaultVirtualThreads;
1403
1404   /**
1405    * Env-driven default controlling whether the {@link TraceContextResponseProcessor} is registered so the
1406    * server writes W3C {@code traceparent} / {@code tracestate} response headers when a {@link TracerHook} is
1407    * active. Defaults to {@code true} (on-when-tracer); set {@code RestContext.responseTraceparent=false}
1408    * to keep the processor out of the chain entirely.
1409    */
1410   @Value("${RestContext.responseTraceparent:true}")
1411   private boolean defaultResponseTraceparent;
1412
1413   /**
1414    * Env-driven default controlling whether {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.MdcAsyncListener} propagates
1415    * the request thread's SLF4J MDC map to {@link java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture} completion threads
1416    * Defaults to {@code true} (on when SLF4J is detected). Set
1417    * {@code RestContext.mdcAsyncPropagation=false} to disable globally, or call
1418    * {@link Builder#mdcAsyncPropagation(boolean)} per resource.
1419    */
1420   @Value("${RestContext.mdcAsyncPropagation:true}")
1421   private boolean defaultMdcAsyncPropagation;
1422
1423   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(eagerInit)}. */
1424   @Value("${RestContext.eagerInit:false}")
1425   private boolean defaultEagerInit;
1426
1427   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(lazyChildren)}: deferred child construction opt-in. */
1428   @Value("${RestContext.lazyChildren:false}")
1429   private boolean defaultLazyChildren;
1430
1431   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(clientVersionHeader)}. */
1432   @Value("${RestContext.clientVersionHeader:Client-Version}")
1433   private String defaultClientVersionHeader;
1434
1435   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(uriRelativity)}; resolves to empty string when unset (treated as "no default"). */
1436   @Value("${RestContext.uriRelativity:}")
1437   private String defaultUriRelativity;
1438
1439   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(uriAuthority)}; {@link Optional#empty()} when unset (preserves null-vs-empty distinction). */
1440   @Value("${RestContext.uriAuthority}")
1441   private Optional<String> defaultUriAuthority;
1442
1443   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(uriContext)}; {@link Optional#empty()} when unset (preserves null-vs-empty distinction). */
1444   @Value("${RestContext.uriContext}")
1445   private Optional<String> defaultUriContext;
1446
1447   /** Env-driven default for {@code @Rest(uriResolution)}; resolves to empty string when unset (treated as "no default"). */
1448   @Value("${RestContext.uriResolution:}")
1449   private String defaultUriResolution;
1450
1451   /**
1452    * The {@link DebugEnablement} for this resource.
1453    *
1454    * <p>
1455    * Resolved from {@code @Rest(debugDefault)} (most-derived non-blank wins), falling back to
1456    * {@code @Rest(debug=true|false)}. The resolved {@link Enablement} is published into the bean store
1457    * so that {@link BasicDebugEnablement} subclasses can pick it up. Defaults to {@link BasicDebugEnablement}.
1458    * A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
1459    */
1460   private final Memoizer<DebugEnablement> debugEnablement = memoizer(() -> {
1461      // @Rest(debugDefault="ALWAYS|NEVER|CONDITIONAL") — most-derived non-blank value wins, with parent inheritance
1462      // gated by @Rest(noInherit={"debugDefault"}). Resolved value is published as an Enablement bean so that
1463      // BasicDebugEnablement.init() (and any subclass) can pick it up via beanStore().getBean(Enablement.class).
1464      // Annotation value overrides any pre-registered Enablement bean (e.g. mock-client default).
1465      // If neither a debugDefault annotation value NOR a pre-registered Enablement bean is present, fall back
1466      // to the @Rest(debug=true|false) boolean flag — ALWAYS when set, NEVER otherwise.
1467      var bs = beanStore();
1468      String debugDefaultStr = mergeReplacedStringAttribute(PROPERTY_debugDefault, defaultDebugDefault);
1469      Enablement resolvedDebugDefault = null;
1470      if (nn(debugDefaultStr) && !debugDefaultStr.isBlank())
1471         resolvedDebugDefault = Enablement.fromString(debugDefaultStr);
1472      if (nn(resolvedDebugDefault))
1473         bs.addBean(Enablement.class, resolvedDebugDefault);
1474      else if (bs.getBean(Enablement.class).isEmpty())
1475         bs.addBean(Enablement.class, isDebug() ? Enablement.ALWAYS : Enablement.NEVER);
1476      var creator = BeanInstantiator.of(DebugEnablement.class, bs).type(BasicDebugEnablement.class).noBuilder();
1477      bs.getBeanType(DebugEnablement.class).ifPresent(creator::type);
1478      bs.createBeanFromMethod(DebugEnablement.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(creator::impl);
1479      return creator.asOptional().orElse(null);
1480   });
1481
1482   /**
1483    * The {@link DebugConfig} for this resource.
1484    */
1485   private final Memoizer<DebugConfig> debugConfig = memoizer(() -> {
1486      var bs = beanStore();
1487      var mode = getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_debug)
1488         .map(ai -> resolve(ai.inner().debug().value()))
1489         .filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank)
1490         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1491         .orElse("");
1492      var formatType = getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_debug)
1493         .map(ai -> ai.inner().debug().format())
1494         .filter(c -> c != DebugFormat.Void.class)
1495         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1496         .orElse(null);
1497      var levelStr = getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_debug)
1498         .map(ai -> resolve(ai.inner().debug().level()))
1499         .filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank)
1500         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
1501         .orElse("");
1502      var format = formatType == null ? new BasicTextFormat() : BeanInstantiator.of(DebugFormat.class, bs).type(formatType).run();
1503      var level = StringUtils.isNotBlank(levelStr) ? Level.parse(levelStr) : Level.parse(defaultDebugLevel);
1504      var mode2 = mode;
1505      return new DebugConfig(bs) {
1506         @Override
1507         public DebugResult resolve(RestContext context, HttpServletRequest req) {
1508            var enabled = isTrue(cast(Boolean.class, req.getAttribute("Debug")));
1509            if (!enabled) {
