1510               if ("always".equalsIgnoreCase(mode2) || "true".equalsIgnoreCase(mode2))
1511                  enabled = true;
1512               else if ("conditional".equalsIgnoreCase(mode2))
1513                  enabled = "true".equalsIgnoreCase(req.getHeader("Debug"));
1514            }
1515            var cacheBodies = enabled;
1516            return new DebugResult(enabled, format, level, cacheBodies);
1517         }
1518
1519         @Override
1520         public DebugResult resolve(RestOpContext context, HttpServletRequest req) {
1521            var opDebug = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE.find(RestOp.class, MethodInfo.of(context.getJavaMethod())).stream().findFirst();
1522            if (opDebug.isPresent()) {
1523               var v = RestContext.this.resolve(opDebug.get().inner().debug().value());
1524               if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(v)) {
1525                  if ("always".equalsIgnoreCase(v) || "true".equalsIgnoreCase(v))
1526                     return new DebugResult(true, format, level, true);
1527                  if ("never".equalsIgnoreCase(v) || "false".equalsIgnoreCase(v))
1528                     return new DebugResult(false, format, level, false);
1529                  if ("conditional".equalsIgnoreCase(v))
1530                     return new DebugResult("true".equalsIgnoreCase(req.getHeader("Debug")), format, level, true);
1531               }
1532            }
1533            return resolve(context.getContext(), req);
1534         }
1535      };
1536   });
1537
1538   /**
1539    * The default request attributes contributed by {@code @Rest(defaultRequestAttributes)} for this resource.
1540    *
1541    * <p>
1542    * Walks {@code @Rest} annotations parent-to-child, resolving each attribute string and parsing it as a
1543    * key=value or key:value pair. A named bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES
1544    * the accumulated result.
1545    */
1546   private final Memoizer<NamedAttributeMap> defaultRequestAttributes = memoizer(() -> {
1547      var v = Holder.of(NamedAttributeMap.create());
1548      // Resolution moved onto the unified noInherit-aware walk (cleanup #3): getRestAnnotationsForProperty yields
1549      // the same parent-to-child order getRestAnnotationsTopDown did for non-mixin contexts, plus host→mixin
1550      // inheritance, noInherit cutoff, and @Mixin override injection for mixin sub-contexts.
1551      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_defaultRequestAttributes).forEach(ai -> Arrays.stream(ai.inner().defaultRequestAttributes())
1552         .filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank)
1553         .map(this::resolve)
1554         .filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank)
1555         .map(BasicNamedAttribute::ofPair)
1556         .forEach(v.get()::add));
1557      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(NamedAttributeMap.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, PROP_defaultRequestAttributes), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1558      return v.get();
1559   });
1560
1561   /**
1562    * The default request headers contributed by {@code @Rest(defaultRequestHeaders)},
1563    * {@code @Rest(defaultAccept)}, and {@code @Rest(defaultContentType)} for this resource.
1564    *
1565    * <p>
1566    * Walks {@code @Rest} annotations parent-to-child, resolving each header string. A named bean-store
1567    * override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the accumulated result.
1568    */
1569   private final Memoizer<HttpHeaderList> defaultRequestHeaders = memoizer(() -> {
1570      var v = Holder.of(HttpHeaderList.create());
1571      // Resolution moved onto the unified noInherit-aware walk (cleanup #3) — see defaultRequestAttributes.
1572      // defaultAccept/defaultContentType are folded into this same walk (as they always were); they key off
1573      // the defaultRequestHeaders property for noInherit/override purposes.
1574      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders).forEach(ai -> {
1575         Rest a = ai.inner();
1576         Arrays.stream(a.defaultRequestHeaders()).filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank).map(this::resolve).filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank).map(HttpStringHeader::ofPair).forEach(v.get()::setDefault);
1577         var defaultAccept = resolve(a.defaultAccept());
1578         if (isNotBlank(defaultAccept))
1579            v.get().setDefault(Accept.of(defaultAccept));
1580         var defaultContentType = resolve(a.defaultContentType());
1581         if (isNotBlank(defaultContentType))
1582            v.get().setDefault(ContentType.of(defaultContentType));
1583      });
1584      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(HttpHeaderList.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, PROP_defaultRequestHeaders), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1585      return v.get();
1586   });
1587
1588   /**
1589    * The default response headers contributed by {@code @Rest(defaultResponseHeaders)} for this resource.
1590    *
1591    * <p>
1592    * Walks {@code @Rest} annotations parent-to-child, resolving each header string. A named bean-store
1593    * override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the accumulated result.
1594    */
1595   private final Memoizer<HttpHeaderList> defaultResponseHeaders = memoizer(() -> {
1596      var v = Holder.of(HttpHeaderList.create());
1597      // Resolution moved onto the unified noInherit-aware walk (cleanup #3) — see defaultRequestAttributes.
1598      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_defaultResponseHeaders).forEach(ai -> Arrays.stream(ai.inner().defaultResponseHeaders()).filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank).map(this::resolve).filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank).map(HttpStringHeader::ofPair).forEach(v.get()::setDefault));
1599      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(HttpHeaderList.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, PROP_defaultResponseHeaders), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1600      return v.get();
1601   });
1602
1603   /**
1604    * Methods annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestDestroy @RestDestroy} and their invokers.
1605    */
1606   private final Memoizer<LifecycleInvokerPair> destroyInvokerPair = memoizer(() -> buildLifecycleInvokerPair(() -> {
1607      var bs = beanStore();
1608      var v = Holder.of(MethodList.of(getAnnotatedMethods(resource(), RestDestroy.class).toList()));
1609      bs.createBeanFromMethod(MethodList.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, "destroyMethods"), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1610      return v.get();
1611   }));
1612
1613   /**
1614    * Fully-configured {@link EncoderSet.Builder} for this resource, populated from the
1615    * {@code @Rest(encoders)} annotation chain and any {@code @Bean} override.
1616    *
1617    * <p>
1618    * Starts with {@link IdentityEncoder} as the implicit default. A bean-store type override
1619    * or bean-store instance override REPLACES the builder or its impl. Annotation entries
1620    * (parent-to-child) are appended after the default. A {@code @Bean} factory method
1621    * REPLACES the impl with the returned value.
1622    */
1623   private final Memoizer<EncoderSet.Builder> encodersBuilder = memoizer(() -> {
1624      var bs = beanStore();
1625      var v = Holder.of(EncoderSet.create(bs));
1626      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_encoders).forEach(ai -> v.get().add(ai.inner().encoders()));
1627      bs.createBeanFromMethod(EncoderSet.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, v.get()).ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
1628      return v.get();
1629   });
1630
1631   /**
1632    * The {@link EncoderSet} for this resource, built from the self-contained encoder builder memoizer.
1633    */
1634   private final Memoizer<EncoderSet> encoders = memoizer(() -> encodersBuilder.get().build());
1635
1636   /**
1637    * Methods annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestEndCall @RestEndCall} and their invokers.
1638    */
1639   private final Memoizer<LifecycleInvokerPair> endCallInvokerPair = memoizer(() -> buildLifecycleInvokerPair(() -> {
1640      var bs = beanStore();
1641      var v = Holder.of(MethodList.of(getAnnotatedMethods(resource(), RestEndCall.class).toList()));
1642      bs.createBeanFromMethod(MethodList.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, "endCallMethods"), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1643      return v.get();
1644   }));

1646   /**
1647    * The {@link JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder} for this resource, with annotation work applied.
1648    */
1649   private final Memoizer<JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder> jsonSchemaGeneratorBuilder = memoizer(() -> {
1650      var bs = beanStore();
1651      var v = Holder.of(JsonSchemaGenerator.create());
1652      bs.createBeanFromMethod(JsonSchemaGenerator.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
1653      v.get().apply(annotationWork);
1654      return v.get();
1655   });
1656
1657   /**
1658    * The {@link JsonSchemaGenerator} for this resource.
1659    */
1660   private final Memoizer<JsonSchemaGenerator> jsonSchemaGenerator = memoizer(() -> jsonSchemaGeneratorBuilder.get().build());
1661
1662   /**
1663    * The {@link Logger} for this resource.
1664    *
1665    * <p>
1666    * Defaults to {@code Logger.getLogger(resourceClass.getName())}. A bean-store override or
1667    * {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the default.
1668    */
1669   private final Memoizer<Logger> logger = memoizer(() -> {
1670      var v = Holder.of(Logger.getLogger(cn(resourceClass())));
1671      beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(Logger.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1672      return v.get();
1673   });
1674
1675   /**
1676    * The {@link Messages} bundle for this resource.
1677    *
1678    * <p>
1679    * Walks {@code @Rest} annotations parent-to-child, resolving each {@code messages} location string
1680    * against the bootstrap resolver (full resolver not yet available — it depends on {@code getMessages()}).
1681    * A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
1682    */
1683   private final Memoizer<Messages> messages = memoizer(() -> {
1684      var b = Messages.create(resourceClass());
1685      // Walk @Rest annotations parent-to-child; child wins because location() prepends.
1686      // Resolve location strings against the simple resolver — full resolver isn't available yet
1687      // (it depends on getMessages()).
1688      // NOTE (cleanup #3): messages is structurally bundle-CHAINED (not list/replace-merged), so it keeps its
1689      // own local location walk + Messages.chain rather than routing through getRestAnnotationsForProperty
1690      // (which would double-count host locations for a mixin context).  The two @Mixin hooks are layered on
1691      // explicitly instead: (1) a host @Mixin(messages=...) location is applied last (highest priority), and
1692      // (2) the host→mixin chain cutoff consults the unified noInherit set, so @Mixin(noInherit="messages")
1693      // cuts the host bundle exactly like the mixin class's own @Rest(noInherit="messages").
1694      var vrs = getBootstrapVarResolver().createSession();
1695      getRestAnnotationsTopDown().forEach(ai -> ai.getString(PROPERTY_messages).filter(StringUtils::isNotBlank).ifPresent(s -> b.location(vrs.resolve(s))));
1696      var rmMessages = resolvedMixinField();
1697      if (rmMessages != null) {
1698         var mm = rmMessages.overrides().messages();
1699         if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(mm))
1700            b.location(vrs.resolve(mm));
1701      }
1702      var override = beanStore().createBeanFromMethod(Messages.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, b).orElse(null);
1703      var local = nn(override) ? override : b.build();
1704      var parent = parentContext();
1705      // Use the SVL-free isNoInheritLiteral (NOT the noInherit memoizer) to avoid a resolver cycle:
1706      // noInherit -> resolveCdl -> getVarResolver -> getMessages -> messages.  It now also consults the
1707      // host @Mixin(noInherit=...) tokens so a @Mixin can cut the host bundle just like the mixin class's own.
1708      if (isMixinContextField() && nn(parent) && !isNoInheritLiteral(PROPERTY_messages))
1709         return Messages.chain(local, parent.getMessages());
1710      return local;
1711   });
1712
1713   /**
1714    * The {@link MethodExecStore} for this resource, wired to the {@link ThrownStore}.
1715    *
1716    * <p>
1717    * A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
1718    */
1719   private final Memoizer<MethodExecStore> methodExecStore = memoizer(() -> {
1720      var bs = beanStore();
1721      var b = MethodExecStore.create(bs).thrownStoreOnce(getThrownStore());
1722      bs.createBeanFromMethod(MethodExecStore.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, b).ifPresent(b::impl);
1723      return b.build();
1724   });
1725
1726   /**
1727    * Fully-configured {@link ParserSet.Builder} for this resource, populated from the
1728    * {@code @Rest(parsers)} annotation chain and any {@code @Bean} override.
1729    *
1730    * <p>
1731    * Starts with an empty set. A bean-store type or instance override REPLACES the builder or its impl.
1732    * Annotation entries (parent-to-child) are appended. A {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the impl.
1733    */
1734   private final Memoizer<ParserSet.Builder> parsersBuilder = memoizer(() -> {
1735      var bs = beanStore();
1736      var v = Holder.of(ParserSet.create(bs));
1737      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_parsers).forEach(ai -> v.get().add(ai.inner().parsers()));
1738      bs.createBeanFromMethod(ParserSet.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, v.get()).ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
1739      return v.get();
1740   });
1741
1742   /**
1743    * The {@link ParserSet} for this resource, built from the self-contained parser builder memoizer.
1744    */
1745   private final Memoizer<ParserSet> parsers = memoizer(() -> parsersBuilder.get().build());
1746
1747   /**
1748    * The {@link HttpPartParser.Creator} for this resource, with annotation work applied.
1749    */
1750   private final Memoizer<HttpPartParser.Creator> partParserCreator = memoizer(() -> {
1751      var bs = beanStore();
1752      Holder<HttpPartParser.Creator> v = Holder.of(HttpPartParser.creator().type(OpenApiParser.class));
1753      opt(resource().get() instanceof HttpPartParser x ? x : null).ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
1754      bs.createBeanFromMethod(HttpPartParser.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
1755      v.get().apply(annotationWork);
1756      return v.get();
1757   });
1758
1759   /**
1760    * The {@link HttpPartParser} for this resource.
1761    *
1762    * <p>
1763    * Starts from the creator (general config annotations already applied) and adds the
1764    * {@code @Rest(partParser)} type override from the most specific annotation in the hierarchy.
1765    */
1766   private final Memoizer<HttpPartParser> partParser = memoizer(() -> {
1767      var creator = partParserCreator.get();
1768      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_partParser)
1769         .map(ai -> ai.inner().partParser())
1770         .filter(ClassUtils::isNotVoid)
1771         .reduce((a, b) -> b)
1772         .ifPresent(creator::type);
1773      return creator.create();
1774   });
1775
1776   /**
1777    * The {@link HttpPartSerializer.Creator} for this resource, with annotation work applied.
1778    */
1779   private final Memoizer<HttpPartSerializer.Creator> partSerializerCreator = memoizer(() -> {
1780      var bs = beanStore();
1781      Holder<HttpPartSerializer.Creator> v = Holder.of(HttpPartSerializer.creator().type(OpenApiSerializer.class));
1782      opt(resource().get() instanceof HttpPartSerializer x ? x : null).ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
1783      bs.createBeanFromMethod(HttpPartSerializer.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
1784      v.get().apply(annotationWork);
1785      return v.get();
1786   });
1787
1788   /**
1789    * The {@link HttpPartSerializer} for this resource.
1790    *
1791    * <p>
1792    * Starts from the creator (general config annotations already applied) and adds the
1793    * {@code @Rest(partSerializer)} type override from the most specific annotation in the hierarchy.
1794    */
1795   private final Memoizer<HttpPartSerializer> partSerializer = memoizer(() -> {
1796      var creator = partSerializerCreator.get();
1797      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_partSerializer)
1798         .map(ai -> ai.inner().partSerializer())
1799         .filter(ClassUtils::isNotVoid)
1800         .reduce((a, b) -> b)
1801         .ifPresent(creator::type);

1803   });
1804
1805   /**
1806    * Methods annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestPostCall @RestPostCall}.
1807    */
1808   private final Memoizer<MethodList> postCallMethods = memoizer(() -> {
1809      var bs = beanStore();
1810      var v = Holder.of(MethodList.of(getAnnotatedMethods(resource(), RestPostCall.class).toList()));
1811      bs.createBeanFromMethod(MethodList.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, "postCallMethods"), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1812      return v.get();
1813   });
1814
1815   /**
1816    * Pre-resolved invokers for this context's local {@code @RestPostCall} methods, bound to this
1817    * context's resource instance and bean-store-resolved arg resolvers. Used by the {@link #postCall(RestOpSession)}
1818    * parent-chain walk so that host hooks fire before mixin hooks on mixin-endpoint requests.
1819    *
1820    * <p>
1821    * Hook methods aren't op-specific, so the wrapping bean store stubs in the op-only {@link UrlPathMatcher}
1822    * binding with {@code null} so that {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg.PathArg#create PathArg.create()} (and
1823    * other op-aware resolvers) can be called by {@link #findRestOperationArgs(java.lang.reflect.Method, BeanStore)}
1824    * and abstain (return {@code null}) for parameters that aren't {@code @Path}-annotated. Using
1825    * {@code @Path} on a {@code @RestPostCall} method is not supported.
1826    */
1827   private final Memoizer<RestOpInvoker[]> localPostCallInvokers = memoizer(() -> {
1828      var bs = new BasicBeanStore(beanStore());
1829      var pm = getPathMatcher() != null ? getPathMatcher() : UrlPathMatcher.of("");
1830      bs.addBean(UrlPathMatcher.class, pm);
1831      bs.addBean(UrlPathMatcher[].class, new UrlPathMatcher[]{pm});
1832      return postCallMethods.get().stream()
1833         .map(x -> new RestOpInvoker(x, findRestOperationArgs(x, bs), getMethodExecStats(x), this::getResource))
1834         .toArray(RestOpInvoker[]::new);
1835   });
1836
1837   /**
1838    * Methods annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestPostInit @RestPostInit}{@code (childFirst=true)} and their invokers.
1839    */
1840   private final Memoizer<LifecycleInvokerPair> postInitChildFirstInvokerPair = memoizer(() -> buildLifecycleInvokerPair(() -> {
1841      var bs = beanStore();
1842      var v = Holder.of(MethodList.of(getAnnotatedMethods(resource(), RestPostInit.class)
1843         .filter(m -> rstream(AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE.find(RestPostInit.class, MethodInfo.of(m))).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).anyMatch(RestPostInit::childFirst))
1844         .toList()));
1845      bs.createBeanFromMethod(MethodList.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, "postInitChildFirstMethods"), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1846      return v.get();
1847   }));
1848
1849   /**
1850    * Methods annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestPostInit @RestPostInit} and their invokers.
1851    */
1852   private final Memoizer<LifecycleInvokerPair> postInitInvokerPair = memoizer(() -> buildLifecycleInvokerPair(() -> {
1853      var bs = beanStore();
1854      var v = Holder.of(MethodList.of(getAnnotatedMethods(resource(), RestPostInit.class)
1855         .filter(m -> rstream(AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE.find(RestPostInit.class, MethodInfo.of(m))).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).anyMatch(x -> !x.childFirst()))
1856         .toList()));
1857      bs.createBeanFromMethod(MethodList.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, "postInitMethods"), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1858      return v.get();
1859   }));
1860
1861   /**
1862    * Methods annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestPreCall @RestPreCall}.
1863    */
1864   private final Memoizer<MethodList> preCallMethods = memoizer(() -> {
1865      var bs = beanStore();
1866      var v = Holder.of(MethodList.of(getAnnotatedMethods(resource(), RestPreCall.class).toList()));
1867      bs.createBeanFromMethod(MethodList.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, "preCallMethods"), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
1868      return v.get();
1869   });
1870
1871   /**
1872    * Pre-resolved invokers for this context's local {@code @RestPreCall} methods, bound to this
1873    * context's resource instance and bean-store-resolved arg resolvers. Used by the {@link #preCall(RestOpSession)}
1874    * parent-chain walk so that host hooks fire before mixin hooks on mixin-endpoint requests.
1875    *
1876    * <p>
1877    * Hook methods aren't op-specific, so the wrapping bean store stubs in the op-only {@link UrlPathMatcher}
1878    * binding with {@code null} so that {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg.PathArg#create PathArg.create()} (and
1879    * other op-aware resolvers) can be called by {@link #findRestOperationArgs(java.lang.reflect.Method, BeanStore)}
1880    * and abstain (return {@code null}) for parameters that aren't {@code @Path}-annotated. Using
1881    * {@code @Path} on a {@code @RestPreCall} method is not supported.
1882    */
1883   private final Memoizer<RestOpInvoker[]> localPreCallInvokers = memoizer(() -> {
1884      var bs = new BasicBeanStore(beanStore());
1885      var pm = getPathMatcher() != null ? getPathMatcher() : UrlPathMatcher.of("");
1886      bs.addBean(UrlPathMatcher.class, pm);
1887      bs.addBean(UrlPathMatcher[].class, new UrlPathMatcher[]{pm});
1888      return preCallMethods.get().stream()
1889         .map(x -> new RestOpInvoker(x, findRestOperationArgs(x, bs), getMethodExecStats(x), this::getResource))
1890         .toArray(RestOpInvoker[]::new);
1891   });
1892
1893   /**
1894    * The supported response content types ({@code Accept} media types) for this resource.
1895    *
1896    * <p>
1897    * Walks {@code @Rest(produces)} annotations parent-to-child and returns the union. When no annotation
1898    * declares types, falls back to the intersection of all op-level serializer supported media types.
1899    */
1900   private final Memoizer<List<MediaType>> produces = memoizer(() -> {
1901      // Walk @Rest(produces=...) chain (parent-to-child); concat all entries in chain order.
1902      var fromAnnotations = new ArrayList<MediaType>();
1903      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_produces)
1904         .forEach(ai -> stream(ai.inner().produces()).map(MediaType::of).forEach(fromAnnotations::add));
1905      if (! fromAnnotations.isEmpty())
1906         return u(fromAnnotations);
1907      // Fall back to the intersection of opContexts' serializer-supported media types — matches legacy behavior.
1908      var opContexts = restOperations().getOpContexts();
1909      Set<MediaType> s = opContexts.isEmpty() ? emptySet() : toSet(opContexts.get(0).getSerializers().getSupportedMediaTypes());
1910      opContexts.forEach(x -> s.retainAll(x.getSerializers().getSupportedMediaTypes()));
1911      return u(toList(s));
1912   });
1913
1914   /**
1915    * JVM-wide cache of {@link ResponseProcessor} provider classes discovered via {@link ServiceLoader}.
1916    *
1917    * <p>
1918    * Populated lazily on first use and shared across all {@link RestContext} instances. Empty on a bare
1919    * {@code juneau-rest-server} classpath; non-empty only when an opt-in module (e.g.
1920    * {@code juneau-rest-server-reactive}) ships a
1921    * {@code META-INF/services/org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.ResponseProcessor} provider file.
1922    */
1923   @SuppressWarnings({
1924      "java:S3077" // volatile is required for correct double-checked-locking safe-publication of this JVM-wide cache; the reference is publish-once and never compound-mutated.
1925   })
1926   private static volatile List<Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>> serviceLoaderResponseProcessors;
1927
1928   /**
1929    * Returns the module-contributed {@link ResponseProcessor} classes discovered via {@link ServiceLoader},
1930    * caching the result for the lifetime of the JVM.
1931    *
1932    * <p>
1933    * Provider <em>types</em> are resolved (not instantiated) so each {@link RestContext} can instantiate its
1934    * own bean-store-injected copy. Discovery failures are swallowed at {@code FINE} so a malformed provider
1935    * never fails resource startup; on a bare classpath the returned list is empty and the default processor
1936    * chain is unchanged.
1937    *
1938    * @return The discovered processor classes (possibly empty, never {@code null}).
1939    */
1940   private static List<Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>> discoverServiceLoaderResponseProcessors() {
1941      var p = serviceLoaderResponseProcessors;
1942      if (p == null) {
1943         synchronized (RestContext.class) {
1944            p = serviceLoaderResponseProcessors;
1945            if (p == null) {
1946               p = loadServiceLoaderResponseProcessors();
1947               serviceLoaderResponseProcessors = p;
1948            }
1949         }
1950      }
1951      return p;
1952   }
1953
1954   private static List<Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>> loadServiceLoaderResponseProcessors() {
1955      var out = new ArrayList<Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>>();
1956      try {
1957         for (var it = ServiceLoader.load(ResponseProcessor.class).stream().iterator(); it.hasNext();)
1958            addNextServiceLoaderResponseProcessor(out, it);
1959      } catch (ServiceConfigurationError | RuntimeException e) {
1960         LOG.log(Level.FINE, e, () -> "ServiceLoader for ResponseProcessor failed: " + e.getMessage());
1961      }
1962      return List.copyOf(out);
1963   }
1964
1965   private static void addNextServiceLoaderResponseProcessor(List<Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>> out, Iterator<ServiceLoader.Provider<ResponseProcessor>> it) {
1966      try {
1967         out.add(it.next().type());
1968      } catch (ServiceConfigurationError | RuntimeException e) {
1969         LOG.log(Level.FINE, e, () -> "Skipping ServiceLoader-discovered ResponseProcessor: " + e.getMessage());
1970      }
1971   }
1972
1973   /**
1974    * The ordered array of {@link ResponseProcessor} instances for this resource.
1975    *
1976    * <p>
1977    * Walks {@code @Rest(responseProcessors)} annotations parent-to-child (append order). A bean-store
1978    * override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the entire list.
1979    */
1980   private final Memoizer<ResponseProcessor[]> responseProcessors = memoizer(() -> {
1981      // Walk @Rest(responseProcessors=...) chain (parent-to-child via getRestAnnotationsForProperty).
1982      // DefaultConfig contributes the framework defaults at the top of the chain; resource-class entries append.
1983      // ResponseProcessorList.Builder.add(...) uses addAll (append) — final order: [DefaultConfig, parent, child].
1984      var bs = beanStore();
1985      var b = ResponseProcessorList.create(bs);
1986      // When enabled (default on-when-tracer), front-load the W3C trace-context processor so it
1987      // writes traceparent/tracestate headers before the body-rendering processors run. It short-circuits
1988      // at request time when no TracerHook stashed a trace context, so it's zero-cost on the no-tracer path.
1989      if (defaultResponseTraceparent)
1990         b.add(TraceContextResponseProcessor.class);
1991      // Front-load any module-contributed ResponseProcessors discovered via
1992      // ServiceLoader (e.g. the opt-in juneau-rest-server-reactive module's ReactiveResponseProcessor,
1993      // which must run ahead of AsyncResponseProcessor). Inert on a bare juneau-rest-server classpath —
1994      // when no module ships a META-INF/services/...ResponseProcessor provider file the list is empty and
1995      // the chain is identical to the pre-feature default.
1996      discoverServiceLoaderResponseProcessors().forEach(b::add);
1997      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_responseProcessors)
1998         .forEach(ai -> b.add(ai.inner().responseProcessors()));
1999      // @Bean method override REPLACES the entire annotation-derived list.
2000      var override = bs.createBeanFromMethod(ResponseProcessorList.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, b).orElse(null);
2001      return (nn(override) ? override : b.build()).toArray();
2002   });
2003
2004   /**
2005    * The ordered array of {@link RestOpArg} argument-resolver types for this resource.
2006    *
2007    * <p>
2008    * Walks {@code @Rest(restOpArgs)} annotations parent-to-child (prepend order, so child entries
2009    * take priority). A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the entire list.
2010    */
2011   private final Memoizer<Class<? extends RestOpArg>[]> restOpArgs = memoizer(() -> {
2012      // Walk @Rest(restOpArgs=...) chain (parent-to-child via getRestAnnotationsForProperty).
2013      // DefaultConfig contributes the framework arg-resolver list; resource-class entries override.
2014      // RestOpArgList.Builder.add(...) uses prependAll — applying per-annotation in chain order yields
2015      // final order: [child, parent, DefaultConfig], matching the legacy apply-pass behavior.
2016      var bs = beanStore();
2017      var b = RestOpArgList.create(bs);
2018      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_restOpArgs)
2019         .forEach(ai -> b.add(ai.inner().restOpArgs()));
2020      // @Bean method override REPLACES the entire annotation-derived list.
2021      var override = bs.createBeanFromMethod(RestOpArgList.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, b).orElse(null);
2022      return (nn(override) ? override : b.build()).asArray();
2023   });
2024
2025   /**
2026    * Fully-configured {@link SerializerSet.Builder} for this resource, populated from the
2027    * {@code @Rest(serializers)} annotation chain and any {@code @Bean} override.
2028    *
2029    * <p>
2030    * Starts with an empty set. A bean-store type or instance override REPLACES the builder or its impl.
2031    * Annotation entries (parent-to-child) are appended. A {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the impl.
2032    */
2033   private final Memoizer<SerializerSet.Builder> serializersBuilder = memoizer(() -> {
2034      var bs = beanStore();
2035      var v = Holder.of(SerializerSet.create(bs));
2036      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_serializers).forEach(ai -> v.get().add(ai.inner().serializers()));
2037      bs.createBeanFromMethod(SerializerSet.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, v.get()).ifPresent(x -> v.get().impl(x));
2038      return v.get();
2039   });
2040
2041   /**
2042    * The {@link SerializerSet} for this resource, built from the self-contained serializer builder memoizer.
2043    */
2044   private final Memoizer<SerializerSet> serializers = memoizer(() -> serializersBuilder.get().build());
2045
2046   /**
2047    * Methods annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestStartCall @RestStartCall} and their invokers.
2048    */
2049   private final Memoizer<LifecycleInvokerPair> startCallInvokerPair = memoizer(() -> buildLifecycleInvokerPair(() -> {
2050      var bs = beanStore();
2051      var v = Holder.of(MethodList.of(getAnnotatedMethods(resource(), RestStartCall.class).toList()));
2052      bs.createBeanFromMethod(MethodList.class, resource().get(), x -> isBeanMethod(x, "startCallMethods"), v.get()).ifPresent(v::set);
2053      return v.get();
2054   }));
2055
2056   /**
2057    * The {@link StaticFiles} provider for this resource.
2058    *
2059    * <p>
2060    * Defaults to {@link BasicStaticFiles}. {@code @Rest(staticFiles=X)} most-derived non-{@code Void} class wins.
2061    * A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
2062    */
2063   private final Memoizer<StaticFiles> staticFiles = memoizer(() -> {
2064      var bs = beanStore();
2065      var creator = BeanInstantiator.of(StaticFiles.class, bs).type(BasicStaticFiles.class).noBuilder();
2066      bs.getBeanType(StaticFiles.class).ifPresent(creator::type);
2067      // @Rest(staticFiles=X) — most-derived non-Void wins. See callLogger for the reduce-last rationale.
2068      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_staticFiles)
2069         .map(ai -> ai.inner().staticFiles())
2070         .filter(c -> c != StaticFiles.Void.class)
2071         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
2072         .ifPresent(creator::type);
2073      bs.createBeanFromMethod(StaticFiles.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(creator::impl);
2074      return creator.asOptional().orElse(null);
2075   });
2076
2077   /**
2078    * The {@link SwaggerProvider} for this resource.
2079    *
2080    * <p>
2081    * Defaults to {@link BasicSwaggerProvider}. {@code @Rest(swaggerProvider=X)} most-derived
2082    * non-{@code Void} class wins. A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
2083    */
2084   private final Memoizer<SwaggerProvider> swaggerProvider = memoizer(() -> {
2085      var bs = beanStore();
2086      // Register the resource class as a SwaggerResource bean so SwaggerProvider implementations
2087      // can resolve it via constructor injection (rather than reading it off a Builder).
2088      bs.addBean(SwaggerResource.class, SwaggerResource.of(resourceClass()));
2089      var creator = BeanInstantiator.of(SwaggerProvider.class, bs).type(BasicSwaggerProvider.class).noBuilder();
2090      bs.getBeanType(SwaggerProvider.class).ifPresent(creator::type);
2091      // @Rest(swaggerProvider=X) — most-derived non-Void wins. See callLogger for the reduce-last rationale.
2092      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_swaggerProvider)
2093         .map(ai -> ai.inner().swaggerProvider())
2094         .filter(c -> c != SwaggerProvider.Void.class)
2095         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
2096         .ifPresent(creator::type);
2097      bs.createBeanFromMethod(SwaggerProvider.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(creator::impl);
2098      return creator.asOptional().orElse(null);
2099   });
2100
2101   /**
2102    * The {@link OpenApiProvider} for this resource.
2103    *
2104    * <p>
2105    * Defaults to {@link BasicOpenApiProvider}. {@code @Rest(openApiProvider=X)} most-derived
2106    * non-{@code Void} class wins. A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
2107    */
2108   private final Memoizer<OpenApiProvider> openApiProvider = memoizer(() -> {
2109      var bs = beanStore();
2110      bs.addBean(OpenApiResource.class, OpenApiResource.of(resourceClass()));
2111      var creator = BeanInstantiator.of(OpenApiProvider.class, bs).type(BasicOpenApiProvider.class).noBuilder();
2112      bs.getBeanType(OpenApiProvider.class).ifPresent(creator::type);
2113      // @Rest(openApiProvider=X) — most-derived non-Void wins.
2114      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_openApiProvider)
2115         .map(ai -> ai.inner().openApiProvider())
2116         .filter(c -> c != OpenApiProvider.Void.class)
2117         .reduce((first, second) -> second)
2118         .ifPresent(creator::type);
2119      bs.createBeanFromMethod(OpenApiProvider.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod).ifPresent(creator::impl);
2120      return creator.asOptional().orElse(null);
2121   });
2122
2123   /**
2124    * The {@link ThrownStore} for this resource, used to track exception statistics.
2125    *
2126    * <p>
2127    * Inherits from the parent context's store when one is present. A bean-store override or
2128    * {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
2129    */
2130   private final Memoizer<ThrownStore> thrownStore = memoizer(() -> {
2131      var bs = beanStore();
2132      var b = ThrownStore.create(bs).impl(parentContext() == null ? null : parentContext().getThrownStore());
2133      bs.createBeanFromMethod(ThrownStore.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, b).ifPresent(b::impl);
2134      return b.build();
2135   });
2136
2137   /**
2138    * The runtime {@link VarResolver} — wraps the bootstrap resolver and adds {@link Messages} and {@link Config} beans.
2139    *
2140    * <p>
2141    * The bootstrap {@link Config} is pulled from the {@code rawConfig} memoizer to avoid a circular
2142    * dependency: the runtime {@link Config} wraps the bootstrap config in a session backed by this resolver.
2143    * A bean-store override or {@code @Bean} factory method REPLACES the result.
2144    */
2145   private final Memoizer<VarResolver> varResolver = memoizer(() -> {
2146      var bs = beanStore();
2147      var b = getBootstrapVarResolver().copy()
2148         .bean(Messages.class, getMessages())
2149         .bean(Config.class, rawConfig.get());
2150      var override = bs.createBeanFromMethod(VarResolver.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, b).orElse(null);
2151      return nn(override) ? override : b.build();
2152   });
2153
2154   /**
2155    * Per-mixin {@link RestContext} sub-contexts, keyed by the mixin class.
2156    *
2157    * <p>
2158    * Built lazily (alongside {@link #restOperations}) and only on the host's {@link RestContext} &mdash; mixin
2159    * sub-contexts themselves never spawn further sub-contexts (the flat-inheritance rule: a mixin's
2160    * {@code @Rest(mixins=B)} discovers B as a mixin of the host, not as a nested mixin of A).
2161    *
2162    * <p>
2163    * Each sub-context is constructed with a {@link ContextKind.Mixin} {@link Args#kind() kind}, with its
2164    * {@code parentContext} pointing at this host context.  That parent-linkage drives the inheritance walk in
2165    * {@link #getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String)} for serializers, parsers, encoders, converters, response
2166    * processors, REST op args, guards, callLogger, debugEnablement, messages, varResolver tokens, etc.
2167    *
2168    * @since 10.0.0
2169    */
2170   private final Memoizer<Map<Class<?>,RestContext>> mixinContexts = memoizer(() -> {
2171      if (isMixinContextField())
2172         return Map.of();
2173      var out = new LinkedHashMap<Class<?>,RestContext>();
2174      for (var rm : getResolvedMixins()) {
2175         if (rm.type() == resourceClass())
2176            continue;
2177         RestContext mixinCtx;
2178         try {
2179            mixinCtx = buildMixinContext(rm);
2180         } catch (RuntimeException e) {
2181            throw e;
2182         } catch (Exception e) {
2183            throw rex(e, "Failed to construct mixin sub-context for {0}: {1}", rm.type().getName(), e.getMessage());
2184         }
2185         out.put(rm.type(), mixinCtx);
2186      }
2187      return u(out);
2188   });
2189
2190   /**
2191    * Builds a per-mixin sub-{@link RestContext} for the given mixin class.
2192    *
2193    * <p>
2194    * Instantiates the mixin resource via this host's bean store, constructs a new {@link RestContext} with
2195    * {@code parentContext=this} and a {@link ContextKind.Mixin} {@link Args#kind() kind}, and reflectively invokes
2196    * any {@code setContext(RestContext)} method on the mixin instance (mirroring the existing
2197    * {@code RestChildren.buildChildContext(...)} contract).  The host's {@link ServletConfig} is propagated
2198    * so the mixin sees the same servlet container settings.
2199    *
2200    * <p>
2201    * Mixin instance resolution: an importer-supplied {@code @Bean <MixinClass>} factory in the host's
2202    * bean store wins over reflective instantiation. When the host registers
2203    * {@code @Bean public MyMixin myMixin() { ... }} (or a Spring {@code @Bean} of the same type), that
2204    * pre-built instance is used as the mixin resource; otherwise the mixin is instantiated via
2205    * {@code beanStore.instantiate(mixinClass)} (no-arg / builder / injected-constructor path). This lets
2206    * convention-endpoint mixins (favicon, SEO, version, well-known) be configured by the importer using
2207    * their own builder before the mixin walk wires them in.
2208    */
2209   private RestContext buildMixinContext(ResolvedMixin rm) throws Exception {
2210      var mixinClass = rm.type();
2211      Object preBuilt = beanStore.getBean(mixinClass).orElse(null);
2212      final var mixinResource = preBuilt != null ? preBuilt : beanStore.instantiate(mixinClass);
2213      var args = new Args(mixinClass, this, builder.inner, () -> mixinResource, "", null, null, null, new ContextKind.Mixin(rm));
2214      var mixinCtx = new RestContext(args);
2215      var setCtx = ClassInfo.of(mixinResource).getMethod(x -> x.hasName("setContext") && x.hasParameterTypes(RestContext.class)).orElse(null);
2216      if (setCtx != null)
2217         setCtx.accessible().invoke(mixinResource, mixinCtx);
2218      return mixinCtx;
2219   }
2220
2221   /**
2222    * Returns the per-mixin {@link RestContext} sub-contexts indexed by mixin class.
2223    *
2224    * <p>
2225    * Returns an empty map when this context is itself a mixin sub-context, or when no mixins are declared.
2226    *
2227    * @return An unmodifiable map of mixin class to its sub-{@link RestContext}; never {@code null}.
2228    * @since 10.0.0
2229    */
2230   public Map<Class<?>,RestContext> getMixinContexts() { return mixinContexts.get(); }
2231
2232   /**
2233    * Returns the host-chosen mount prefix(es) declared on the {@code @Mixin} that produced this mixin
2234    * sub-context, for re-mounting the mixin's endpoints under host-chosen path(s).
2235    *
2236    * <p>
2237    * Resolved from {@link Mixin#path()} and {@link Mixin#paths()} (SVL-resolved, then normalized via the same
2238    * {@code pathToken} cleanup the bundled SVL-configurable mixins use — leading/trailing slashes and a trailing
2239    * {@code /*} wildcard stripped to a bare token).  {@link Mixin#path()} (single) and {@link Mixin#paths()}
2240    * (multi) are unioned; an empty result means "no host re-mount" (the mixin's own op paths apply unchanged).
2241    *
2242    * @return The normalized, de-duplicated mount-prefix tokens (no slashes), or an empty list when none; never {@code null}.
2243    * @since 10.0.0
2244    */
2245   public List<String> getMixinMountPrefixes() { return mixinMountPrefixes.get(); }
2246
2247   /**
2248    * Memoized normalized {@code @Mixin(path/paths)} mount prefixes (built once; zero per-request cost).
2249    */
2250   private final Memoizer<List<String>> mixinMountPrefixes = memoizer(() -> {
2251      var rm = resolvedMixinField();
2252      if (rm == null || rm.hasNoOverrides())
2253         return List.of();
2254      var m = rm.overrides();
2255      var out = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
2256      var vrs = getBootstrapVarResolver().createSession();
2257      if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(m.path()))
2258         addMountPrefix(out, vrs.resolve(m.path()));
2259      for (var p : m.paths())
2260         if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(p))
2261            addMountPrefix(out, vrs.resolve(p));
2262      return List.copyOf(out);
2263   });
2264
2265   /** Normalizes one path override to a bare token (strip leading/trailing slashes and a trailing {@code /*}). */
2266   private static void addMountPrefix(Set<String> out, String raw) {
2267      var s = trim(raw);
2268      if (s.endsWith("/*"))
2269         s = s.substring(0, s.length() - 2);
2270      // Strip leading and trailing slashes.
2271      while (s.startsWith("/"))
2272         s = s.substring(1);
2273      while (s.endsWith("/"))
2274         s = s.substring(0, s.length() - 1);
2275      if (! s.isEmpty())
2276         out.add(s);
2277   }
2278
2279   /**
2280    * The {@link RestOperations} for this resource — all {@link RestOpContext} instances built from
2281    * methods annotated with {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOp @RestOp} (and related).
2282    *
2283    * <p>
2284    * Eagerly initialized in the constructor (via an explicit {@code .get()} call inside the try-catch block)
2285    * so that any {@link ServletException} surfaces at construction time rather than lazily on first request.
2286    * Subsequent calls return the cached instance.
2287    *
2288    * <p>
2289    * For mixin classes declared via {@link Rest#mixins() @Rest(mixins)}, each mixin's {@code @RestOp} methods
2290    * are bound to a per-mixin {@link RestContext} sub-context (see {@link #mixinContexts}) so that the
2291    * mixin's annotation chain inherits from the host's via {@link #getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String)}.
2292    * Mixin sub-contexts themselves never participate in mixin discovery &mdash; the {@code if (!isMixinContext)}
2293    * guard below short-circuits the flat-inheritance rule (a mixin's {@code @Rest(mixins=B)} is collected at
2294    * the host level, not nested under A).
2295    */
2296   @SuppressWarnings({
2297      "java:S3776", // High cognitive complexity is inherent in REST operation set initialization.
2298      "java:S1141"  // Nested try/catch blocks required for granular error reporting during initialization.
2299   })
2300   private final Memoizer<RestOperations> restOperations = memoizer(() -> safe(() -> {
2301      initializeFrameworkBeansForRestOps();
2302      var bs = beanStore();
2303      var b = RestOperations.create(bs);
2304      var ap = getMarshallingContext().getAnnotationProvider();
2305      var rci = ClassInfo.of(resource().get());
2306      if (!isMixinContextField()) {
2307         var contexts = mixinContexts.get();
2308         for (var e : contexts.entrySet()) {
2309            var mixinClass = e.getKey();
2310            var mixinCtx = e.getValue();
2311            addRestOperationsForClass(b, ap, ClassInfo.of(mixinClass), mixinCtx, mixinCtx::getResource);
2312         }
2313      }
2314      addRestOperationsForClass(b, ap, rci, this, this::getResource);
2315      var override = bs.createBeanFromMethod(RestOperations.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, b).orElse(null);
2316      return nn(override) ? override : b.build();
2317   }));
2318
2319   private void addRestOperationsForClass(RestOperations.Builder b, AnnotationProvider ap, ClassInfo classInfo, RestContext opContext, Supplier<Object> targetSupplier) throws ServletException {
2320      for (var mi : classInfo.getPublicMethods()) {
2321         var al = rstream(ap.find(mi)).filter(REST_OP_GROUP).collect(Collectors.toList());
2322         if (al.isEmpty()) {
2323            Predicate<MethodInfo> isRestAnnotatedInterface = x -> x.getDeclaringClass().isInterface()
2324               && nn(x.getDeclaringClass().getAnnotations(Rest.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null));
2325            mi.getMatchingMethods().stream().filter(isRestAnnotatedInterface).forEach(x -> al.add(AnnotationInfo.of(x, RestOpAnnotation.DEFAULT)));
2326         }
2327         if (!al.isEmpty()) {
2328            try {
2329               if (mi.isNotPublic())
2330                  throw servletException("@RestOp method {0}.{1} must be defined as public.", classInfo.inner().getName(), mi.getNameSimple());
2331               var roc = new RestOpContext(mi.inner(), opContext, targetSupplier);
2332               if ("RRPC".equals(roc.getHttpMethod())) {
2333                  RestOpContext roc2 = new RrpcRestOpContext(mi.inner(), opContext, targetSupplier);
2334                  b.add("GET", roc2).add("POST", roc2);
2335               } else {
2336                  b.add(roc);
2337               }
2338            } catch (Exception e) {
2339               throw servletException(e, "Problem occurred trying to initialize methods on class {0}", classInfo.inner().getName());
2340            }
2341         }
2342      }
2343   }
2344
2345   /**
2346    * Discovers all mixins declared on this resource's {@code @Rest} chain, normalized to {@link ResolvedMixin}.
2347    *
2348    * <p>
2349    * Reads both {@link Rest#mixins() bare-class} and {@link Rest#mixinDefs() rich &#64;Mixin} entries (bare first,
2350    * then {@code mixinDefs}), recursing into each mixin class's own {@code @Rest(mixins=)}/{@code @Rest(mixinDefs=)}
2351    * (the flat-inheritance rule still applies — nested mixins are collected at the host level).  First occurrence
2352    * of a class wins for ordering; a rich {@code @Mixin} <b>upgrades</b> an earlier bare entry for the same class
2353    * (a bare class is just {@code @Mixin(type=X)} with empty overrides, so upgrading only adds the host overrides).
2354    *
2355    * @return The ordered, de-duplicated normalized mixins, never {@code null}.
2356    */
2357   private Collection<ResolvedMixin> getResolvedMixins() {
2358      var out = new LinkedHashMap<Class<?>,ResolvedMixin>();
2359      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(PROPERTY_mixins).forEach(ai -> {
2360         for (var mixin : ai.inner().mixins())
2361            collectResolvedMixin(ResolvedMixin.ofBare(mixin), out);
2362         for (var def : ai.inner().mixinDefs())
2363            collectResolvedMixin(ResolvedMixin.ofDef(def), out);
2364      });
2365      return out.values();
2366   }
2367
2368   private void collectResolvedMixin(ResolvedMixin rm, LinkedHashMap<Class<?>,ResolvedMixin> out) {
2369      var type = rm.type();
2370      // type==null is defensive only — @Mixin.type() defaults to Object.class and a declarative @Mixin requires
2371      // a class literal, so it is never null in practice.  type==resourceClass() guards a host/mixin listing
2372      // itself (skip to avoid self-recursion).
2373      if (type == null || type == resourceClass())  // HTT: the null arm is not reachable via the annotation API.
2374         return;
2375      var existing = out.get(type);
2376      if (existing != null) {
2377         // Already discovered.  A rich @Mixin upgrades a bare entry (in place, preserving position); otherwise
2378         // the first occurrence wins and we do not recurse again.
2379         if (existing.hasNoOverrides() && ! rm.hasNoOverrides())
2380            out.put(type, rm);
2381         return;
2382      }
2383      out.put(type, rm);
2384      var r = type.getAnnotation(Rest.class);
2385      if (r != null) {
2386         for (var nested : r.mixins())
2387            collectResolvedMixin(ResolvedMixin.ofBare(nested), out);
2388         for (var nestedDef : r.mixinDefs())
2389            collectResolvedMixin(ResolvedMixin.ofDef(nestedDef), out);
2390      }
2391   }
2392
2393   /**
2394    * The {@link RestChildren} for this resource — child {@link RestContext} instances registered via
2395    * {@link Rest#children() @Rest(children)}.
2396    *
2397    * <p>
2398    * Reads child classes directly from the {@code @Rest(children)} annotation chain (parent-to-child),
2399    * deduplicates, instantiates each child via the bean store, and builds a {@link RestContext} for each.
2400    * Eagerly initialized in the constructor (via an explicit {@code .get()} call inside the try-catch
2401    * block) so that any construction failure surfaces at initialization time rather than lazily.
2402    */
2403   @SuppressWarnings({
2404      "java:S3776" // cognitive complexity acceptable for child-context construction
2405   })
2406   private final Memoizer<RestChildren> restChildren = memoizer(() -> safe(() -> {
2407      var bs = beanStore();
2408      var servletConfig = bs.getBean(ServletConfig.class).orElse(null);
2409      var b = RestChildren.create(this, bs, servletConfig);
2410
2411      // Collect child classes from @Rest(children) on the annotation chain (parent-to-child order).
2412      // Deduplicate so the same child class registered on both a parent and child annotation
2413      // doesn't create two contexts.
2414      var seen = new LinkedHashSet<Class<?>>();
2415      getRestAnnotations().forEach(ai -> seen.addAll(Arrays.asList(ai.inner().children())));
2416
2417      var lazy = isLazyChildren();
2418
2419      for (var rc2 : seen) {
2420         if (rc2 == resourceClass())
2421            continue;  // Guard against self-reference infinite loop.
2422         if (lazy) {
2423            // Lazy: register a routing stub now; defer full RestContext construction to first request.
2424            b.addLazy(rc2, "");
2425         } else {
2426            // Eager (default): build the full child RestContext immediately.
2427            b.add(RestChildren.buildChildContext(this, bs, servletConfig, rc2, null, ""));
2428         }
2429      }
2430
2431      // @Bean override — allows replacing the entire RestChildren instance.
2432      var override = bs.createBeanFromMethod(RestChildren.class, resource().get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod, b).orElse(null);
2433      return nn(override) ? override : b.build();
2434   }));
2435
2436   /**
2437    * Constructor.
2438    *
2439    * @param args The bootstrap arguments. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
2440    * @throws Exception If any initialization problems were encountered.
2441    * @since 10.0.0
2442    */
2443   public RestContext(Args args) throws Exception {
2444      this(new Builder(args));
2445   }
2446
2447   /**
2448    * Internal constructor.
2449    *
2450    * <p>
2451    * Privatized in the April 2026 refactor (2026-04-19). External callers must use
2452    * {@link #RestContext(Args)} instead.
2453    *
2454    * @param builder The builder containing the settings for this bean.
2455    * @throws Exception If any initialization problems were encountered.
2456    */
2457   @SuppressWarnings({
2458      "java:S3776", // High cognitive complexity is inherent in REST context constructor initialization.
2459      "java:S1141"  // Nested try/catch blocks required for granular error reporting during initialization.
2460   })
2461   private RestContext(Builder builder) throws Exception {
2462      super(builder);
2463
2464      startTime = Instant.now();
2465
2466      REGISTRY.put(builder.resourceClass, this);
2467
2468      BasicHttpException initExceptionTemp = null;
2469
2470      try {
2471         this.builder = builder;
2472
2473         parentContext = builder.parentContext;
2474         contextKind = builder.args.kind();
2475         isMixinContext = contextKind instanceof ContextKind.Mixin;
2476         resolvedMixin = (contextKind instanceof ContextKind.Mixin m) ? m.def() : null;
2477         resourceClass = builder.resourceClass;
2478         var rs = new ResourceSupplier(resourceClass, assertArgNotNull("resource", builder.args.resource()));
2479         resource = rs;
2480
2481         // Resolve the programmatic configuration builder.  Prefer the one carried on Args (set by
2482         // RestServlet.init()); otherwise read the builder stashed on the resource instance (non-reflective) so
2483         // programmatic construction via MockRestClient, child mounting, and mixin composition all honor it.
2484         var rb = builder.args.restBuilder();
2485         if (rb == null)
2486            rb = stashedRestBuilder(rs.get());
2487         restBuilder = rb;
2488         if (restBuilder instanceof AbstractRestBuilder<?,?> arb) {
2489            // Synthetic, highest-priority @Rest carrying the builder-set members; prepended (most-derived
2490            // child position) to the @Rest chain by the restAnnotations memoizer so builder values win.
2491            builderRestAnnotation = arb.toRestAnnotation();
2492            // Programmatic mdcAsyncPropagation knob (no @Rest member) wins over the env-driven default.
2493            if (arb.getMdcAsyncPropagation() != null && builder.mdcAsyncPropagation == null)
2494               builder.mdcAsyncPropagation = arb.getMdcAsyncPropagation();
2495         } else {
2496            builderRestAnnotation = null;
2497         }
2498
2499         // --- beanStore setup (May 2026 refactor; precedence-flipped 10.0) ---
2500
2501         // Determine the parent (bootstrap) store: inherited from parent resource if present.
2502         //
2503         // For mixin sub-contexts, the parent is the host's FULL beanStore (not just the bootstrap layer)
2504         // so that resource-class-level @Bean factory methods declared on the host class are visible to
2505         // the mixin's resolution chain.  Mixin endpoints resolved through the host's beanStore directly;
2506         // with per-mixin sub-contexts, the same effect is
2507         // achieved by parent-linking the mixin's beanStore to the host's full beanStore.
2508         //
2509         // For top-level resources and @Rest(children) sub-resources, the parent remains the bootstrap
2510         // layer (children are intentionally independent of the host's resource-class beans).
2511         WritableBeanStore parentBs;
2512         if (parentContext != null && isMixinContext)
2513            parentBs = parentContext.beanStore;
2514         else if (parentContext != null)
2515            parentBs = parentContext.bootstrapBeanStore;
2516         else
2517            parentBs = null;
2518
2519         // Build the initial beanStore; honor an optional @Bean WritableBeanStore override.
2520         // In the new 10.0 precedence model, the parent (Spring or parent-resource bootstrap) is
2521         // installed as the overriding parent so it wins over local entries.
2522         // Args.overridingParent threads into the per-resource (final beanStore) overridingParent
2523         // slot so test-time overlays (TestBeanStore) resolve at tier 1 of the chain ahead of
2524         // any @Bean factory result registered as a local entry below.
2525         // @formatter:off
2526         var argsOverlay = builder.args.overridingParent();
2527         WritableBeanStore bs = createBeanStore(parentBs, rs, parentBs == null ? null : argsOverlay)
2528            .addBean(ResourceSupplier.class, rs)
2529            .addBean(ServletConfig.class, nn(builder.inner) ? builder.inner : builder)
2530            .addBean(ServletContext.class, (nn(builder.inner) ? builder.inner : builder).getServletContext());
2531         // @formatter:on
2532
2533         // If no parent store, promote bs to bootstrap and layer a fresh per-resource v2 store on top.
2534         // The overlay belongs on the per-resource store so it wins over @Bean factories registered
2535         // as local entries below; the bootstrap deliberately does NOT get the overlay (it sits above
2536         // the per-resource entries via the parent chain, which is too low for an overlay).
2537         if (parentBs == null) {
2538            bootstrapBeanStore = bs;
2539            bs = new BasicBeanStore(bootstrapBeanStore, argsOverlay);
2540         } else {
2541            bootstrapBeanStore = parentBs;
2542         }
2543         beanStore = bs;
2544
2545         beanStore.addBean(WritableBeanStore.class, beanStore);
2546         // Register the bootstrap VarResolver as a NAMED entry only.  The unnamed VarResolver
2547         // slot is intentionally left to the registerFrameworkDefaults() default supplier (which
2548         // resolves to the full runtime VarResolver) so that internal accessors such as
2549         // getVarResolver() return the right thing when routed through beanStore.getBean(...).
2550         beanStore.add(VarResolver.class, getBootstrapVarResolver(), PROP_bootstrapVarResolver);
2551         // Force-build raw Config now (fail fast if @Rest(config) is misconfigured).  The unnamed
2552         // Config slot in the bean store is intentionally left to the default supplier (the full
2553         // runtime Config) — @RestInit hooks that take Config as a parameter will see the fully
2554         // resolved instance instead of the raw bootstrap Config (10.0 behavior change).
2555         rawConfig.get();
2556         // Per-RestContext @Value resolution bridge: register the @Rest(config=...) Configs as
2557         // PropertySource beans inside THIS resource's BeanStore (NOT on the process-wide
2558         // Settings.get() singleton — that path was a 6.7x perf regression because
2559         // MockRestClient's static RestContext cache leaks instances and Settings.get()'s source
2560         // list grew unbounded). Per-resource isolation comes for free from the BeanStore scope.
2561         registerRestConfigPropertySources();
2562
2563         // Register memoizer-backed defaults for every framework-managed type.  These sit at the
2564         // bottom of the precedence order and only fire when no @Bean method, no programmatic
2565         // add, and no Spring/overriding-parent bean has been registered for the type.  This is
2566         // what removes the need for the old DELAYED_INJECTION gate-keeping list — the @Bean
2567         // walk below can now invoke any framework type's factory and still resolve framework
2568         // dependencies through the bean store.
2569         registerFrameworkDefaults(beanStore);
2570
2571         // For mixin sub-contexts, the bean store is parent-linked to the host's full beanStore so that
2572         // host-declared @Bean factory results (e.g. @Bean(name="db") HealthIndicator dbIndicator()) are
2573         // visible through the mixin's lookup chain.  But the parent walk also picks up the host's
2574         // framework defaults (SerializerSet, ParserSet, CallLogger, ...) at the parent's tier-4 slot
2575         // before this store's tier-4 defaults can fire — which would shadow this mixin's per-context
2576         // framework objects.  Promoting our defaults into local entries (tier 2) makes them resolve
2577         // ahead of the parent walk while still letting an overriding parent (e.g. Spring) and explicit
2578         // local @Bean registrations win.  Top-level resources and @Rest(children=...) sub-resources keep
2579         // the original tier-4 default semantics so a parent-supplied framework bean (e.g. Spring's
2580         // SerializerSet) still wins as it did before.
2581         if (isMixinContext && beanStore instanceof BasicBeanStore mixinBs)
2582            mixinBs.promoteDefaultsToLocalSuppliers();
2583
2584         var rci2 = ClassInfo.of(resourceClass);
2585
2586         // Register @Bean fields that already have a value.
2587         // @formatter:off
2588         rci2.getAllFields().stream()
2589            .filter(x -> x.hasAnnotation(Bean.class))
2590            .forEach(x -> opt(x.get(resource.get())).ifPresent(
2591               y -> beanStore.add(
2592                  x.getFieldType().inner(),
2593                  y,
2594                  BeanAnnotation.name(x.getAnnotations(Bean.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null))
2595               )
2596            ));
2597         // @formatter:on
2598
2599         // Run @Bean methods and register their results as LOCAL entries (level 2 of resolve()).
2600         //
2601         // For non-framework types: invoke the @Bean method directly via createBeanFromMethod
2602         // and store the result via addBean.
2603         //
2604         // For framework types (those with a default supplier registered above): the @Bean
2605         // scan already ran inside the corresponding memoizer body (see e.g. createCallLogger()),
2606         // so re-invoking createBeanFromMethod here would create a SECOND instance and produce
2607         // inconsistent state between the framework's memoizer-backed bean and the bean store's
2608         // local entry.  Instead, PROMOTE the existing default supplier (which is memoizer-backed
2609         // and resolves to the @Bean value when one was supplied) into a local-entry supplier.
2610         // Promoting at level 2 means @Bean results win over a parent (Spring) at level 3.
2611         //
2612         // Net effect: @Bean method results uniformly take precedence over Spring/parent
2613         // bindings for both framework and user-defined types.  This auto-derives the legacy
2614         // DELAYED_INJECTION list from the default-supplier registrations.
2615         rci2.getAllMethods().stream().filter(x -> x.hasAnnotation(Bean.class)).forEach(x -> {
2616            var rt = x.getReturnType().<Object>inner();
2617            var name = BeanAnnotation.name(x.getAnnotations(Bean.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null));
2618            // Skip the WritableBeanStore factory (already consumed by createBeanStore()).
2619            if (WritableBeanStore.class.equals(rt) || BeanStore.class.equals(rt))
2620               return;
2621            if (beanStore instanceof BasicBeanStore bbs2 && bbs2.hasDefaultSupplier(rt, name)) {
2622               bbs2.getDefaultSupplier(rt, name).ifPresent(sup -> beanStore.addSupplier(rt, sup, name));
2623               return;
2624            }
2625            beanStore.createBeanFromMethod(rt, resource.get(), RestContext::isBeanMethod)
2626               .ifPresent(y -> beanStore.addBean(rt, y, name));
2627         });
2628
2629         // Run @RestInit-annotated methods on the resource object (deduplicated by signature, top-down order).
2630         // Note: pre-10.0 this filter also excluded `y.hasParameter(RestOpContext.Builder.class)` because the
2631         // per-op `@RestInit(RestOpContext.Builder)` flow handled those separately. That flow was deleted in
2632         // April 2026 refactor Route B (zero real-world callers), so the exclusion is gone too. Likewise, the
2633         // class-level `@RestInit(RestContext.Builder)` injection protocol was deleted in the same refactor
2634         // (zero non-test callers anywhere) — `RestContext.Builder` is no longer added to the bean store, so
2635         // any straggling `@RestInit` method that still declares either Builder type as a parameter will now
2636         // surface a "missing prerequisites" error here, which is the desired loud-failure signal.
2637         var r = resource.get();
2638         var initMap = CollectionUtils.<String,MethodInfo>map();
2639         ClassInfo.ofProxy(r).getAllMethodsTopDown().stream()
2640            .filter(y -> y.hasAnnotation(RestInit.class))
2641            .forEach(y -> { var sig = y.getSignature(); if (!initMap.containsKey(sig)) initMap.put(sig, y.accessible()); });
2642         for (var m : initMap.values()) {
2643            if (!m.canResolveAllParameters(beanStore, r))
2644               throw servletException("Could not call @RestInit method {0}.{1}.  Could not find prerequisites: {2}.", cns(m.getDeclaringClass()), m.getSignature(), m.getMissingParameterTypes(beanStore, r));
2645            try {
2646               m.inject(beanStore, r);
2647            } catch (Exception e) {
2648               throw servletException(e, "Exception thrown from @RestInit method {0}.{1}.", cns(m.getDeclaringClass()), m.getSignature());
2649            }
2650         }
2651
2652         // Back-fill @Bean fields that were null before init hooks ran.
2653         // @formatter:off
2654         rci2.getAllFields().stream()
2655            .filter(x -> x.hasAnnotation(Bean.class))
2656            .forEach(x -> x.setIfNull(
2657               resource.get(),
2658               beanStore.getBean(
2659                  x.getFieldType().inner(),
2660                  BeanAnnotation.name(x.getAnnotations(Bean.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null))
2661               ).orElse(null)
2662            ));
2663         // @formatter:on
2664
2665         // Populate @Inject-annotated fields and methods on the resource, then fire @PostConstruct
2666         // callbacks.  This covers the JSR-330 / Spring @Autowired / jakarta.inject.Inject FQNs as
2667         // well as the Juneau-owned @Inject in commons.inject — recognition is FQN-based, see JsrSupport.
2668         rci2.inject(resource.get(), beanStore);
2669
2670         builder.args.beanStoreConfigurer().accept(beanStore);
2671
2672         // --- end beanStore setup ---
2673
2674         // Path resolution: explicit Args.path (non-empty) wins so callers like
2675         // RestChildren.addChild(String,Object) can mount the same class at a custom path; otherwise read
2676         // from the @Rest(path) annotation chain (most-derived class wins). This restores override behavior
2677         // removed in the May 2026 Builder.path elimination, without resurrecting the staging field.
2678         var argsPath = builder.args.path();
2679         if (argsPath != null && ! argsPath.isEmpty()) {
2680            path = trimLeadingSlashes(argsPath);
2681         } else {
2682            path = getRestAnnotations().stream()
2683               .map(ai -> ai.inner().path())
2684               .filter(StringUtils::isNotEmpty)
2685               .findFirst()
2686               .map(s -> trimLeadingSlashes(s))
2687               .orElse("");
2688         }
2689         fullPath = (parentContext == null ? "" : (parentContext.fullPath + '/')) + path;
2690         var p = path;
2691         if (! p.endsWith("/*"))
2692            p += "/*";
2693         pathMatcher = UrlPathMatcher.of(p);
2694
2695         // Top-level mount-paths resolution chain (programmatic > getter > annotation default).
2696         // See javadoc on getPaths() for the full precedence order. Resolution happens once at construction;
2697         // the resolved array is what hosting runtimes (Jetty auto-discovery, Spring Boot ServletRegistrationBean)
2698         // should consume rather than reading the raw @Rest(paths) annotation directly.  Each @Rest(paths)
2699         // element is SVL-resolved through a VarResolver session backed by the live bean store — so
2700         // $C{key} consults whatever Config is currently registered (test overlay, @Bean factory, or the
2701         // framework's runtime Config) and $E{NAME,default} / $S{prop,default} use the bootstrap variable
2702         // catalog without needing any beans.  The session-with-beanstore form is what makes test-time
2703         // Config injection visible to SVL without firing the full runtime VarResolver memoizer.
2704         paths = resolveMountPaths(builder, resource.get(), getBootstrapVarResolver(), beanStore, getRestAnnotations());
2705
2706         // Build annotation work list, then trigger beanContextBuilder (which applies it).
2707         var vrs = getBootstrapVarResolver().createSession();
2708         annotationWork = AnnotationWorkList.of(vrs, rstream(AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE.find(rci2)).filter(CONTEXT_APPLY_FILTER));
2709         beanContextBuilder.get(); // force init with annotationWork now set
2710
2711         // @formatter:off
2712         beanStore
2713            .addBean(RestContext.class, this)
2714            .addBean(Object.class, resource.get())
2715            .addBean(Builder.class, builder)
2716            .addBean(AnnotationWorkList.class, annotationWork);
2717         // @formatter:on
2718
2719      // Inject @Value-annotated env-driven defaults onto this RestContext instance so that the
2720      // memoizer lambdas below (which run lazily on first .get() call) read fully resolved values.
2721      // Must run BEFORE isEagerInit() since the eagerInit memoizer itself reads defaultEagerInit.
2722      ClassInfo.of(this).inject(this, beanStore);
2723
2724      // Startup-fail if @Rest(observability="true") is set but neither MetricsRecorder nor TracerHook is
2725      // supplied. The check runs after all @Bean method injection so that consumer-provided beans are visible.
2726      checkObservabilityBackendPresent();
2727
2728      // Startup-fail: if asyncCompletionExecutor is configured (either by annotation or
2729      // programmatically), force-evaluate the memoizer now so "bean not found" surfaces at context
2730      // init time rather than lazily on the first request.
2731      checkAsyncCompletionExecutorPresent();
2732
2733      if (isEagerInit()) {
2734            // Force-fire the framework-bean memoizers in dependency-friendly order so their @Rest()
2735            // annotation walks (e.g. `@Rest(partParser=…)`, `@Rest(partSerializer=…)`, `@Rest(encoders=…)`,
2736            // etc.) execute eagerly inside the try-catch.  These walks MUTATE the cached creators that
2737            // downstream RestOpContext memoizers later copy from, so they must run before
2738            // getRestOperations() builds the per-op contexts.  We do NOT re-add results to the bean
2739            // store — the default suppliers registered earlier already cover lookups.
2740            initializeFrameworkBeansForRestOps();
2741
2742            // Force-initialize restOperations and restChildren now so that any construction failures
2743            // (e.g. bad @RestOp method or invalid child class) surface here inside the try-catch.
2744            getRestOperations();
2745            getRestChildren();
2746         }
2747
2748         // produces/consumes are resolved lazily via the produces/consumes memoizers below
2749         // (April 2026 refactor, 2026-04-19) — they walk the @Rest(produces=...) / @Rest(consumes=...)
2750         // chain first, then fall back to deriving the intersection of opContexts' supported media types.
2751
2752      } catch (BasicHttpException e) {
2753         initExceptionTemp = e;
2754         throw e;
2755      } catch (Exception e) {
2756         initExceptionTemp = new InternalServerError(e);
2757         throw e;
2758      } finally {
2759         initException = initExceptionTemp;
2760      }
2761   }
2762
2763   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
2764   public RestSession.Builder createSession() {
2765      return RestSession.create(this);
2766   }
2767
2768   //---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2769   // Memoized allowlist fields
2770   //---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2771
2772   /**
2773    * Memoized parser session-option keys from {@code @Rest(allowedParserOptions)}, after SVL resolution and comma expansion.
2774    *
2775    * <p>
2776    * When inheritance is not blocked, keys from {@link #parentContext} are included first, then this resource's own tokens.
2777    * Leading-hyphen tokens (e.g. {@code -foo}) remove earlier positive tokens.
2778    */
2779   private final Memoizer<SortedSet<String>> allowedParserOptions = memoizer(() -> {
2780      var l = new ArrayList<String>();
2781      var p = PROPERTY_allowedParserOptions;
2782      var pc = parentContext();
2783      if (isInherited(p) && pc != null)
2784         l.addAll(pc.getAllowedParserOptions());
2785      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(p).forEach(x -> resolveCdl(x.getStringArray(p)).forEach(l::add));
2786      return u(treeSetCi(removeNegations(l)));
2787   });
2788
2789   /**
2790    * Memoized serializer session-option keys from {@code @Rest(allowedSerializerOptions)}, after SVL resolution and comma expansion.
2791    *
2792    * <p>
2793    * When inheritance is not blocked, keys from {@link #parentContext} are included first, then this resource's own tokens.
2794    * Leading-hyphen tokens remove earlier positive tokens.
2795    */
2796   private final Memoizer<SortedSet<String>> allowedSerializerOptions = memoizer(() -> {
2797      var l = new ArrayList<String>();
2798      var p = PROPERTY_allowedSerializerOptions;
2799      var pc = parentContext();
2800      if (isInherited(p) && pc != null)
2801         l.addAll(pc.getAllowedSerializerOptions());
2802      getRestAnnotationsForProperty(p).forEach(x -> resolveCdl(x.getStringArray(p)).forEach(l::add));
2803      return u(treeSetCi(removeNegations(l)));
2804   });
2805
2806   /**
2807    * Memoized value of the {@code noInherit} annotation attribute from the nearest {@code @Rest} annotation.
2808    *
2809    * <p>
2810    * {@code noInherit} itself is never inherited; it only applies to the {@code @Rest} that declares it.
2811    */
2812   private final Memoizer<SortedSet<String>> noInherit = memoizer(() -> {
2813      var out = treeSet(String.CASE_INSENSITIVE_ORDER,
2814         getRestAnnotation()
2815            .map(x -> x.getStringArray("noInherit").orElse(StringUtils.EMPTY_STRING_ARRAY))
2816            .map(x -> resolveCdl(x).toList())
2817            .orElseGet(Collections::emptyList));
2818      // Dual noInherit source: when this is a mixin sub-context built from a host @Mixin(noInherit=...),
2819      // the host-declared cutoff tokens union with the mixin class's own @Rest(noInherit=...).  A token from
2820      // EITHER source cuts the host→mixin inheritance walk for that property (OQ2/OQ3).
2821      var rmNoInherit = resolvedMixinField();
2822      if (rmNoInherit != null)
2823         resolveCdl(rmNoInherit.overrides().noInherit()).forEach(out::add);
2824      return out;
2825   });
2826
2827   /**
2828    * The host-declared {@code @Mixin} override values translated into a synthetic {@link Rest} annotation, for a
2829    * mixin sub-context that carries overrides.  {@code null} for non-mixin contexts and for mixins with no
2830    * overrides (bare classes).
2831    *
2832    * <p>
2833    * Built once at memoizer-init time (zero per-request cost).  The synthetic annotation is injected at the
2834    * most-derived position of {@link #getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String)} so the host override resolves as if
2835    * declared on the mixin class itself — list-shaped props append after the inherited host chain, replace-shaped
2836    * props win — but ahead of the mixin class's own {@code @Rest}, so the host override is authoritative (OQ3).
2837    */
2838   private final Memoizer<AnnotationInfo<Rest>> mixinOverrideAnnotation = memoizer(() -> {
2839      var rm = resolvedMixinField();
2840      if (rm == null || rm.hasNoOverrides())
2841         return null;
2842      var rest = buildMixinOverrideRest(rm.overrides());
2843      return AnnotationInfo.of(ClassInfo.of(getResourceClass()), rest);
2844   });
2845
2846   /**
2847    * Translates a host-declared {@link Mixin @Mixin} into a synthetic {@link Rest @Rest} carrying only its
2848    * override slots, so the standard {@code @Rest} resolution chain applies the overrides uniformly.
2849    *
2850    * @param m The {@code @Mixin} override declaration.
2851    * @return A synthetic {@code @Rest} populated from {@code m}'s override slots.
2852    */
2853   private static Rest buildMixinOverrideRest(Mixin m) {
2854      // @formatter:off
2855      var b = RestAnnotation.create()
2856         .guards(m.guards())
2857         .roleGuard(m.roleGuard())
2858         .rolesDeclared(m.rolesDeclared())
2859         .converters(m.converters())
2860         .encoders(m.encoders())
2861         .serializers(m.serializers())
2862         .parsers(m.parsers())
2863         .responseProcessors(m.responseProcessors())
2864         .restOpArgs(m.restOpArgs())
2865         .callLogger(m.callLogger())
2866         .partSerializer(m.partSerializer())
2867         .partParser(m.partParser())
2868         .debug(m.debug())
2869         .messages(m.messages())
2870         .defaultRequestHeaders(m.defaultRequestHeaders())
2871         .defaultResponseHeaders(m.defaultResponseHeaders())
2872         .defaultRequestAttributes(m.defaultRequestAttributes())
2873         .produces(m.produces())
2874         .consumes(m.consumes())
2875         .defaultAccept(m.defaultAccept())
2876         .defaultContentType(m.defaultContentType())
2877         .defaultCharset(m.defaultCharset())
2878         .maxInput(m.maxInput());
2879      // @formatter:on
2880      return b.build();
2881   }
2882
2883   /**
2884    * Memoized list of every {@link Rest} annotation on the resource class and its supertypes, in child-to-parent order.
2885    *
2886    * <p>
